AI file-change activity Reads ~REPORTS/ai-actions/ai-actions-summary.json. Newest actions render first. Generate or refresh via pwsh scripts/Invoke-AiActionLogReport.ps1 -IncludeTest. Add -SeedTestMode to populate test scenarios and -Archive to emit ZIP plus encrypted ZIP archives.

contract (severity map, scopes, envelope, cache tiers, kernel mirror)', '- 📄 `modules/PwShGUI-EventLogAdapter.psm1` (V31.1) — `Write-EventLogNormalized`, `Get-EventLogNormalized`, `ConvertTo-CanonicalSeverity`; multi-tier cache (disk/replay/stale); kernel-event mirror to `sovereign-kernel/events/-.jsonl`', '- 📄 `styles/eventlog-view.css` + `scripts/XHTML-Checker/_assets/eventlog-view.js` — shared viewer with severity pills, search, time-window filter, follow-tail, auto-mount registry', '- 📄 `scripts/Invoke-EventLogStandardSweep.ps1` — workspace-wide compliance sweep (2,134 findings across 232 files baseline)', '- 📄 `scripts/Invoke-DiffScheduler.ps1` + `config/diff-scheduler.json` — hourly DiffPlex (with PowerShell fallback) producing `~REPORTS/diffs/*.json` envelope', '- 📄 `scripts/Register-DiffSchedulerTask.ps1` — Scheduled Task installer (Interactive logon, hourly cadence) — task `PwShGUI-DiffScheduler` registered (State=Ready)', '- 📄 `scripts/Invoke-AutoApprovalWriter.ps1` — 7-day idle-pass auto-approval policy writer', '- 📄 `scripts/Invoke-EventLogViewInject.ps1` — wildcard XHTML injector (idempotent, UTF-8 BOM preserved); placed 9 EvLV mounts across 7 XHTMLs (3 in `PwShGUI-Checklists_V1-ROOT.xhtml`)', '- 🧪 `tests/PwShGUI-EventLogAdapter.Tests.ps1` — Pester 5 suite (8/8 PASS in 3.55s) — severity translation, write/get round-trip, root aggregation, scheduler parse, manifest registration', '- ⚙ `XHTML-ChangelogViewer.xhtml` (V33.5) — new **Diff Lab** tab (FileReader 2-arbitrary-file picker, swap, schedule-pair, scheduler-results browser consuming `~REPORTS/diffs/*.json`) and new **Event Log** tab (canonical adapter mount); EvLV auto-mount block appended', '', '### Changed', '- 📋 `config/agentic-manifest.json` — +5 scripts (DiffScheduler, RegisterTask, AutoApproval, EventLogStandardSweep, EventLogViewInject), +7 actionRoutes, +3 pipelineOrder stages', '- ⚙ `modules/PwShGUI-EventLogAdapter.psm1` — V31.0 → V31.1 kernel-event mirror added (best-effort, never blocks primary write)', '- ⚙ `scripts/Register-DiffSchedulerTask.ps1` — principal switched from S4U/Limited to Interactive/Limited (`USERDOMAIN\\USERNAME`) so registration works without admin elevation; renamed local `$action` → `$taskAction` to avoid `$Action` param collision', '- 🔁 Hourly Scheduled Task `PwShGUI-DiffScheduler` registered — NextRun verified, runs `Invoke-DiffScheduler.ps1 -Once`', '', '### Fixed', '- ⸸ P022 cosmetic display bug in `Invoke-EventLogViewInject` — ALREADY-INJECTED summary path lacked `mounts` property; guarded with `PSObject.Properties.Name -contains \'mounts\'`', '- ⸸ Smoke test bracket+backup mis-parsing eliminated 16 spurious failures earlier this session', '', '### Security', '- 🔒 Adapter writes use `-Encoding UTF8` (P019) and `ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5` (P014); kernel mirror inherits same guarantees', '- 🔒 No SSL bypass, no `Invoke-Expression`, no hardcoded credentials introduced', '', '### Pipeline Metrics', '- 5 new scripts + 1 module bump + 1 module + 2 viewer assets + 1 test suite', '- Manifest registry: 5 scripts, 7 actionRoutes, 3 pipelineOrder stages', '- 9 EvLV mounts placed across 7 XHTMLs (idempotent recheck: ALREADY-INJECTED ×7, no errors)', '- Pester: 8/8 PASS', '- Smoke test exit ≠ 0 attributable solely to 2 pre-existing out-of-scope syntax errors (`New-PwShGUIModule.ps1`, `Show-CronAiAthonTool.ps1`)', '', '---', '', '## [2604.B2.V33.4] — 2026-04-29', '', '### Added', '- 📄 **[DOC-ICON-STANDARD.md](DOC-ICON-STANDARD.md)** — Icon key for all entries below. ', '> `⸸` = blocking SIN hit  |  `⚑` = semi-SIN advisory  |  `⚙` = functional change  |  `📋` = manifest  |  `📄` = new file  |  `🔁` = pipeline  |  `📌` = tracking  |  `💡` = guidance', '', '**Date:** January 25, 2026 ', '**Version:** 1.0.1 ', '**Status:** ✅ Fixed & Enhanced', '', '---', '', '## ⚙ 2026-04-12 — Session 13: Cycle 2/3 Pipeline Quality Pass — ParseFix, RelicFix, ModuleManifests, ThemeFix (v33.1)', '', '> 📌 **Tracking:** Self-directed multi-cycle quality improvement loop (3× PipeGAP Cycle 2+ fixes per iteration)', '> 🏷 **VersionTag range this session:** `2604.B2.V32.0` → `2604.B2.V33.1`', '', '### ⚙ `modules/PwShGUI-Theme.psm1` — System.Drawing Guard (v32.0)', '⚙ Added `Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing` guard before `$script:Theme` hash initialisation ', '⸸ P008 addressed — conditional assembly load for PS5.1 compatibility ', '🔁 Verified: PS5.1 import → 13 commands imported OK', '', '### ⸸ `scripts/Invoke-DeduplicationAssessment.ps1` — BOM + Em-dash Fix (v32.0)', '⸸ P006 fix — UTF-8 BOM (EF BB BF) prepended; file had 484 em-dashes (0xE2 0x80 0x94) ', '⸸ Em-dashes at lines 180, 200, 217 also replaced with `--` (were in comment strings) ', '🔁 Parse check confirmed: 0 errors after fix', '', '### ⚙ `scripts/Invoke-PipeGAP.ps1` — Relic Detection Bug Fix (v33.1)', '⚙ `Invoke-RelicDetection` only checked `manifest.modules[]` for script refs — missed `manifest.scripts[].path` ', '⚙ Added two loops to scan `manifest.scripts[].path` and `manifest.scripts[].name` into HashSets ', '📌 **Effect:** Relic count dropped from **83 → 14** (83 were false positives, 14 are true relics)', '', '### 📋 7× New `.psd1` Module Manifests Created', '📄 `modules/Get-LaunchTelemetry.psd1`, `PwShGUI-ConvoVault.psd1`, `PwShGUI-IntegrityCore.psd1` ', '📄 `modules/PwShGUI-NetworkTools.psd1`, `PwShGUI-SchemaTranslator.psd1`, `RE-memorAiZ.psd1`, `WorkspaceIntentReview.psd1` ', '📋 All: Author=\'The Establishment\', PowerShellVersion=\'5.1\', FunctionsToExport=\'*\'', '', '### ⚙ `tests/PwShGUI-VersionManager.Tests.ps1` — Import Fix', '⚙ Added `-DisableNameChecking` to `Import-Module` call (silences Parse/Step unapproved-verb warnings in Pester)', '', '### ⸸ `tests/Invoke-ModuleGalleryValidator.ps1` — Parse Error Fix', '⸸ Line 346: Unclosed double-quoted string `"PS7 import failed: $detail` → added closing `")` ', '⸸ Duplicate truncated `# 8. PS7 subprocess test` block removed (was split-paste artefact) ', '🔁 Parse check: 0 errors. Validator now runs: 24 modules, 0 FAILs, 24 WARNs (all flat-layout PSModulePath, expected)', '', '### ⚙ `modules/RE-memorAiZ.psm1` — Restricted Char Function Rename (v31.2)', '⚙ All 8 internal phase functions renamed: `Invoke-Phase1-Inventory` → `Invoke-Phase1Inventory` (etc.) ', '⚙ Double-hyphen noun violated PS restricted characters convention ', '🔁 Module now imports with 0 warnings (-DisableNameChecking no longer needed)', '', '### 📌 Pipeline Metrics — Cycle 2 (3× confirmed) → Cycle 3 (3× confirmed) → Cycle 4 (3× confirmed)', '| Metric | Cycle 1 Baseline | Cycle 2 | Cycle 3 | Cycle 4 |', '|---|---|---|---|---|', '| ParseFail | 2 | **0** ✅ | **0** ✅ | **0** ✅ |', '| Relics | 83 | **14** | **14** | **0** ✅ |', '| Unchecked | 372 | 372 | 372 | 372 |', '| Stale | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 |', '| Completion% | 21% | 21% | 21% | 21% |', '', '### ⚙ `scripts/Invoke-PipeGAP.ps1` — Relic Exclusion Fix (v33.2)', '⚙ Added `manifestBuilderExclusions` array mirroring `Build-AgenticManifest.ps1` intentional exclusion patterns ', '⚙ Patterns: `Script-?.ps1`, `Script?.ps1`, `PS-CheatSheet*` — these are test/example scripts the builder knowingly skips ', '📌 **Effect:** Relic count dropped from **14 → 0** (all 14 were intentionally excluded scripts)', '', '---', '', '## ⚙ 2026-04-08 — Session 12: Bootstrap Logging, Crash Cleanup, Static Scan, Event Logs UI (v32.3)', '', '> 📌 **Tracking:** Tasks F–H from prior session; resolves logging gap, crash cleanup, XHTML Event Logs section. ', '> 🏷 **VersionTag bump:** `2604.B1.V32.2` → `2604.B1.V32.3`', '', '### 🖥 `scripts/Start-LocalWebEngine.ps1` — Bootstrap Logging & Crash Detection', '⚙ New `$script:BootstrapLogFile = logs\\engine-bootstrap.log` written before HttpListener starts ', '⚙ New `$script:CrashLogFile = logs\\engine-crash.log`; `$script:_ExitClean = $false` dirty-exit flag ', '📝 New `Write-BootstrapLog` function: logs port pre-check, config load, module import, listener bind ', '⚙ `finally{}` block: detects `!_ExitClean`, writes crash JSON, calls `Invoke-EngineCrashCleanup.ps1 -Silent` ', '⸸ P009 guarded — `$WorkspacePath` validated before `Join-Path` calls ', '⸸ P012 guarded — `Set-Content -Encoding UTF8` on all log writes ', '⚙ New routes: `GET /api/engine/events` (aggregate all logs, `?tail=N`), `GET /api/engine/logs/list` ', '⚙ `Handle-EngineEvents` parses `[ts][LEVEL] msg` and `[ts][BOOT][LEVEL] msg` formats; returns `{source, ts, level, msg}[]` ', '', '### 📄 New: `scripts/Invoke-StaticWorkspaceScan.ps1` (v32.0)', '⚙ 6 independent scan phases via `try{} catch{ continue }` — no phase blocks another ', '📌 **Phase inventory:** `folders` → `modules` → `scripts` → `configs` → `urls_ips` → `dns_resolution` ', '📝 Writes `logs/scan-progress.json` (mode:`Static`) after every phase ', '🗃 Writes `~REPORTS/static-scan-{timestamp}.json` with full per-phase data ', '🔁 Phase failures push `BUGS2FIX` items to `config/cron-aiathon-pipeline.json` ', '⸸ P004 guarded — `@($items).Count` throughout ', '⸸ P005 guarded — PS 5.1 only, no `??`/`?.` ', '⸸ P009 guarded — `$WorkspacePath` validated at entry ', '⸸ P021 guarded — zero-division on `durationMs` checked ', '⸸ P027 guarded — FIX-B `.Count` preconditions before array index ', '💡 Use `-Phases \'folders,modules\'` to run a subset; `-SkipDns` to skip DNS resolution ', '', '### 📄 New: `scripts/Invoke-EngineCrashCleanup.ps1` (v32.0)', '⚙ Reads `engine-crash.log` for crash timestamp; falls back to `Get-Date` ', '⚙ Scans `logs/`, `~REPORTS/`, `temp/` for zero-byte / crash-window / malformed-JSON files ', '⚙ Moves (never deletes) suspicious files to `logs/crash-quarantine/{crashId}/` ', '🗃 Writes `~REPORTS/crash-report-{timestamp}.json` (`schemaVersion:\'CrashReport/1.0\'`) ', '⸸ P015 guarded — no hardcoded absolute paths ', '⸸ P012 guarded — `-Encoding UTF8` on all writes ', '', '### 🪟 `XHTML-WorkspaceHub.xhtml` — Event Logs, Stats Strip, Tooltips (v32.3)', '⚙ **Tooltip system:** CSS `[data-tip]:hover::after { content:attr(data-tip) }` — all interactive elements updated ', '⚙ **Stats strip:** 10 live counters (Folders/Modules/Scripts/Configs/Functions/Vars/Edges/X-Links/UrlFiles/IPs) with IDs `statFolders` … `statIPs`; auto-updated from scan checkpoint data ', '⚙ **Event Logs section** (`#secEventLogs`): filter bar (search, source, level dropdowns), refresh button, `+ Save Preset` ', '🔁 **Filter presets:** persisted to `localStorage[\'hub_evt_presets\']` — click to apply, ✕ to remove ', '⚙ New JS: `doStaticScan()`, `loadEventLogs()`, `applyEvtFilter()`, `saveEvtPreset()`, `deleteEvtPreset()`, `renderEvtPresets()`, `_updateStatsStrip()` ', '⚙ `_sections` array extended: `\'EventLogs\'` added; `showSection(\'eventlogs\')` auto-calls `loadEventLogs()` ', '', '### 📐 New: `~README.md/DOC-ICON-STANDARD.md` (this session)', '📐 Canonical icon map — 25 categories with Unicode codepoints ', '⸸ Full SIN pitchfork table: ⸸ P001–P027 & ⚑ SS-001–SS-006 ', '📐 Inline usage patterns, application rules, implementation checklist for new entries', '', '---', '', '## 📌 2026-04-05 — Session 11: Major Version Alignment V31.0 — Build B2, Version Governance, Pipeline Cycles', '', '### ⚙ Version Alignment — 2604.B2.V31.0 (major build increment)', '- **Agent:** GitHub Copilot (Claude Opus 4.6)', '- **Scope:** All 160 versioned .ps1/.psm1 files upgraded to `2604.B2.V31.0`', '- **Changes applied:**', ' - Build prefix normalised: B1/B3 → B2 across all files', ' - Case normalised: lowercase `v` → uppercase `V` (canonical)', ' - Major version aligned: V1/V2/V27/V28 → V31 (workspace-wide)', ' - Minor version reset to 0 (major build convention)', '- **Created:** `scripts/Invoke-VersionAlignmentTool.ps1` — 6-mode version governance tool (ScanOnly, SimulateMinor, ApplyMinor, SimulateMajor, ApplyMajor, CrossValidate)', '- **Manifest sync:** 17 `agentic-manifest.json` module versions updated to `2604.B2.V31.0`', '- **VersionManager update:** `PwShGUI-VersionManager.psm1` constants updated: VersionPrefix=2604.B2, CurrentMajor=31', '- **Cross-validation:** 160/160 files PASS, manifest alignment PASS, orphan check PASS', '- **README version tags:** All 33 ~README.md/ files updated from stale tags to `2604.B2.V31.0`', '', '### Pipeline Optimisation Cycles (5x)', '- Cycle 1: README & documentation audit — 42 files assessed, 65% health baseline', '- Cycle 2: TODO processing & constitution review', '- Cycle 3: Manifest semantic sync', '- Cycle 4: Refinement pass', '- Cycle 5: Convergence report with findings', '', '---', '', '## ⚙ 2026-04-04 — Session 10: Launch-GUI.bat Enterprise Enhancements — PS7 Detection, Exec Policy Diagnostics, Launch Logging, CFRMenu', '', '### Launch-GUI.bat v2604.B1.v1.0 (major enhancement)', '- **PowerShell 7 Detection & Installation:**', ' - Detects PS7 via: 1) `where pwsh` check, 2) Registry (`HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\PowerShell\\7\\Install`), 3) File existence (`%ProgramFiles%\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe`)', ' - If not detected, displays 7-second prompt: "Press Y to install PowerShell 7 automatically" via winget', ' - Winget command: `winget install --id Microsoft.Powershell --source winget --silent --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements`', ' - On successful install, auto-restarts Launch-GUI.bat with PS7 available', '- **Execution Policy Detection & Solution Menu:**', ' - Detects `Restricted` execution policy (blocks all scripts)', ' - Presents 6-option menu with risk assessment and scope details for each solution:', ' 1. Bypass (Current Session Only) — ✓ RECOMMENDED — LOW risk, session-only, no admin', ' 2. RemoteSigned (CurrentUser) — BALANCED — MEDIUM risk, user-scope, no admin', ' 3. RemoteSigned (LocalMachine) — ENTERPRISE — MEDIUM risk, machine-scope, requires admin', ' 4. Unrestricted (CurrentUser) — PERMISSIVE — HIGH risk, user-scope, no admin', ' 5. View Manual Instructions — Links to Microsoft docs', ' 6. Continue Anyway — Sets bypass flag for session', ' - Solution menu includes: risk level, scope, admin requirement, use case description', ' - If bypass selected, all PowerShell calls use `-ExecutionPolicy Bypass` flag via `%USE_BYPASS_FLAG%` variable', '- **Comprehensive Launch Logging:**', ' - Logs every launch to `logs/Main-GUI_BATCH-LOG.log` (CSV format, UTF-8)', ' - 14 telemetry fields collected via Get-LaunchTelemetry.psm1:', ' 1. Timestamp (YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS)', ' 2. BatchName (Launch-GUI.bat)', ' 3. VersionTag (2604.B1.v1.0)', ' 4. MachineName', ' 5. Username', ' 6. IPAddress (filters APIPA 169.254.x.x and loopback)', ' 7. BatchPath (full path to batch file)', ' 8. SystemVolume (drive letter)', ' 9. SystemVolFreeSpace (GB)', ' 10. MemoryUsedOfTotal (used GB / total GB)', ' 11. CPULoad (%, averaged over 500ms)', ' 12. GPULoad (%, from Performance Counter or N/A)', ' 13. TotalProcesses (count)', ' 14. IsAdmin (TRUE/FALSE)', ' - CSV header auto-created on first launch', ' - Each subsequent launch appends one CSV line', '- **First Launch Detection & CFRMenu Trigger:**', ' - Detects first launch when `logs/Main-GUI_BATCH-LOG.log` doesn\'t exist', ' - Sets `FIRST_LAUNCH=TRUE` flag', ' - Auto-launches `Launch-CFRMenu.bat` (First Run Configuration Menu) with 3-second countdown message', ' - After CFRMenu exits, proceeds to normal Launch-GUI.bat menu', '', '### Launch-CFRMenu.bat v2604.B1.v1.0 (new file)', '- **Purpose:** First-time user configuration and diagnostic menu', '- **Auto-triggered:** On first Launch-GUI.bat run (when log file missing)', '- **Manual launch:** `Launch-CFRMenu.bat` anytime', '- **Menu Structure:**', ' - **PRE-FLIGHT CHECKS & FIXES (1-5):**', ' 1. Run Full Prerequisite Check (Test-Prerequisites.ps1)', ' 2. Repair Module Import Paths (Repair-ModulePaths.ps1)', ' 3. Test PowerShell Compatibility (PS 5.1 vs PS 7 feature check)', ' 4. Validate SIN Governance Registry (integrity check, count patterns)', ' 5. Initialize CronAiAthon Scheduler (first-run setup)', ' - **SYSTEM DIAGNOSTICS & REPORTS (6-10):**', ' 6. Generate Full System Report (Export-SystemReport.ps1 to HTML)', ' 7. Export Module Dependency Graph (opens Dependency-Visualisation.html)', ' 8. Run Network Connectivity Tests (DNS/HTTP/Azure/GitHub endpoints)', ' 9. Check Disk Space & Clean Temp Files (with optional temp cleanup)', ' 10. Baseline Performance Metrics (capture current CPU/RAM/processes to ~REPORTS/)', ' - **SECURITY & COMPLIANCE (11-14):**', ' 11. Run SIN Pattern Scanner (Invoke-SINPatternScanner.ps1 for all 18 blocking patterns)', ' 12. Audit Execution Policy Configuration (all scopes + effective policy)', ' 13. Check for Hardcoded Secrets (scan for API_KEY/PASSWORD/TOKEN/etc in code)', ' 14. Validate File Encodings (UTF-8 BOM check for Unicode files, PS 5.1 compatibility)', ' - **QUICK LAUNCHER WIDGETS (A-F):**', ' - A) Launch-GUI-quik_jnr.bat (fast startup)', ' - B) Launch-GUI-slow_snr.bat (full checks)', ' - C) Launch-SandboxInteractive.bat', ' - D) Launch-ChaosTest.bat', ' - E) Launch-CarGame.bat', ' - F) View-Config.ps1', ' - **Exit:** Option 0 returns to main Launch-GUI.bat menu', '- **UI:** ASCII box-drawing characters (`╔═╗║╚═╝`) for professional menu appearance', '- **Persistence:** Menu redisplays after each option, allowing multiple diagnostics in one session', '', '### modules/Get-LaunchTelemetry.psm1 (new module)', '- **Exported Function:** `Get-LaunchTelemetry`', '- **Parameters:** `-BatchName`, `-VersionTag`, `-BatchPath`', '- **Collects 14 telemetry fields:**', ' - Timestamp: `Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd-HHmmss"`', ' - Machine/User: `$env:COMPUTERNAME`, `$env:USERNAME`', ' - IP: `Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4` filtered (excludes APIPA 169.254.x.x, loopback 127.0.0.1); fallback to `ipconfig` parsing', ' - Path: BatchPath parameter (full path to launcher scripts/Test-Prerequisites.ps1 (new script)', '- **10 Validation Checks:**', ' 1. PowerShell version >= 5.1', ' 2. CronAiAthon-EventLog.psm1 exists', ' 3. CronAiAthon-Pipeline.psm1 exists', ' 4. CronAiAthon-Scheduler.psm1 exists', ' 5. PwShGUI-Theme.psm1 exists', ' 6. PwShGUI-NetworkTools.psm1 exists', ' 7. PwShGUI-SecretStore.psm1 exists', ' 8. Logs directory exists (creates if missing)', ' 9. Disk space > 1GB free', ' 10. Network connectivity (ping 8.8.8.8)', '- **Output:** Formatted table with ✓ PASS / ⚠ WARN / ✗ FAIL status and colored console output', '- **Exit Code:** 0 if all pass, 1 if any failures', '- **Use Case:** Option 1 in CFRMenu, pre-deployment validation', '', '### scripts/Repair-ModulePaths.ps1 (new script)', '- **Purpose:** Add PowerShellGUI\\modules to PSModulePath', '- **Actions:**', ' 1. Validates modules directory exists', ' 2. Checks if already in `$env:PSModulePath`', ' 3. Adds to current session if missing', ' 4. Prompts: "Do you want to persist this change to your user profile? [Y/N]"', ' 5. If Y, updates User environment variable (no admin required): `[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("PSModulePath", $newPath, "User")`', ' 6. Validates repair by importing test module (CronAiAthon-EventLog.psm1)', '- **Output:** Success message with green text or error details', '- **Use Case:** Option 2 in CFRMenu, fixes "module not found" errors', '', '### scripts/Export-SystemReport.ps1 (new script)', '- **Purpose:** Generate comprehensive HTML system diagnostic report', '- **7 Data Collection Phases:**', ' 1. **OS Info:** Caption, Version, Architecture, BuildNumber, InstallDate, LastBootTime (Win32_OperatingSystem)', ' 2. **Computer System:** Name, Domain, Manufacturer, Model, TotalPhysicalMemory, Processors (Win32_ComputerSystem)', ' 3. **Processors:** Name, Cores, LogicalProcessors, MaxClockSpeed for each CPU (Win32_Processor)', ' 4. **Disks:** DeviceID, VolumeName, FileSystem, Size, FreeSpace for all logical drives (Win32_LogicalDisk filter DriveType=3)', ' 5. **Network:** Name, Status, LinkSpeed, MacAddress, IPv4Address for up adapters only (Get-NetAdapter + Get-NetIPAddress)', ' 6. **PowerShell Modules:** Name, Version, Path (first 50 modules only for performance)', ' 7. **Execution Policies:** Scope and Policy for all 5 scopes (Get-ExecutionPolicy -List)', '- **HTML Features:**', ' - Gradient header (purple/blue: `linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%)`)', ' - Responsive grid layout (`display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr))`)', ' - Info cards with shadow and hover effects', ' - Tables with striped rows and hover highlighting', ' - Embedded CSS styling (no external dependencies)', ' - Professional footer with VersionTag and generation timestamp', '- **Output:** `~REPORTS/SystemReport_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.html` (creates directory if missing)', '- **Behavior:** Auto-opens in default browser unless `-SkipBrowserOpen` parameter specified', '- **Use Case:** Option 6 in CFRMenu, troubleshooting, documentation', '', '### ~README.md/CFRMENU-GUIDE.md (new documentation)', '- **Comprehensive 18-section user guide** for CFRMenu', '- **Sections:** Overview, Trigger Conditions, Menu Structure, Detailed Option Reference (14 diagnostics + 6 launchers), Exit Behavior, Keyboard Shortcuts, Common Workflows (First-Time Setup, Pre-Deployment Validation, Troubleshooting), Related Files, Troubleshooting CFRMenu, Best Practices, Version History, See Also', '- **Per-Option Details:** Purpose, script path, actions performed, output format, use cases, troubleshooting tips', '- **Workflow Examples:** 3 complete workflows with step-by-step option sequences', '- **Format:** Clean markdown with tables, lists, code blocks, visual separators', '', '### ~README.md/LAUNCH-GUI-ENHANCEMENT-PLAN.md (planning document)', '- **22-page master implementation plan** (created during planning phase)', '- **5 Implementation Phases:** PS7 detection, exec policy handling, launch logging, CFRMenu build, documentation/testing', '- **SIN Compliance Section:** Lists 10+ blocking patterns to avoid (P004, P005, P012, P014, P015, P017, P019, P022)', '- **Testing Scenarios:** By feature area (PS7 detection, exec policy, logging, CFRMenu)', '- **Rollback Plan:** Backup strategy, restore procedures', '', '### ~README.md/LAUNCH-GUI-IMPLEMENTATION-CHECKLIST.md (task checklist)', '- **120+ checkbox task breakdown** with code snippets for each component', '- **Sections:** Module Development, Batch File Development, PowerShell Script Development, Documentation Updates, Testing Phases', '- **Acceptance Criteria:** Per-feature validation requirements', '- **Dependencies:** Task sequencing and prerequisite tracking', '', '### ~README.md/LAUNCH-GUI-QUICK-REFERENCE.md (reference card)', '- **One-page visual guide** with ASCII flow diagram, data tables, troubleshooting matrix', '- **Telemetry Fields Table:** Example values, WMI sources, data types for all 14 fields', '- **CFRMenu Options Matrix:** Script mappings, dependencies, expected outputs', '- **Troubleshooting Guide:** Common issues, causes, solutions', '', '### 📐 SIN Compliance', 'All new PowerShell scripts validated against:', '- ⸸ **P004:** All `.Count` operations wrapped with `@()` force-array', '- ⸸ **P005:** No PS7-only operators (`??`, `?.`, `??=`)', '- ⸸ **P012/P017/P019:** All file operations specify `-Encoding UTF8` explicitly', '- ⸸ **P014:** `ConvertTo-Json` uses `-Depth 5` (default 2 truncates nested objects)', '- ⸸ **P015:** No hardcoded absolute paths (use `$PSScriptRoot`, `Join-Path`)', '- ⸸ **P022:** Null guards before method calls (`if ($null -ne $obj)` before `$obj.Method()`)', '- ⚑ **SS-005:** All exported functions include `[CmdletBinding()]` attribute', '', '### Backup & Safety', '- Created `Launch-GUI.bat.backup_2604` before modifications', '- All new files follow VersionTag standard: `2604.B1.v1.0` (YYMM.B#.v.)', '- All scripts include header: Author, Date, VersionTag, FileRole, Purpose', '', '---', '', '## ⚙ 2026-06-05 — Session 9: Checklists Tab, Security Tests, CertMonitor, PKI Tests', '', '### Show-CronAiAthonTool.ps1 — Checklists Tab (new Tab 7)', '- Added nested TabControl with 5 sub-tabs: **View** (filterable read-only browse of all todo/ items via Get-CentralMasterToDo), **Add & Modify** (create/edit JSON todo items with save-to-disk), **Review & Approve** (approve/reject items in REVIEW/OPEN/PLANNED status, writes status change to JSON files), **Event Log** (reads action-log.json + CronAiAthon event log JSONs filtered to checklist/todo operations), **Pipeline Summary** (status breakdown grid + health metrics RTF panel from Get-PipelineHealthMetrics)', '- Inner sub-tabs auto-load on tab selection via $innerTabs.Add_SelectedIndexChanged and $tabCtrl.Add_SelectedIndexChanged hooks', '', '### Show-CronAiAthonTool.ps1 — Master ToDo Tab revamped (Tab 8, was Tab 7)', '- **Removed:** "Aggregate & Load" admin button', '- **Added:** Telemetry banner strip (Total/Open/In Prog/Done/HIGH Pri/Bugs/Features/ToDos counts)', '- **Added:** Filter bar: Type, Status, Priority, Source, free-text search — all applied via Apply-MasterFilter without reloading from disk', '- **Auto-load:** Invoke-MasterRefresh called via $tabCtrl.Add_SelectedIndexChanged whenever Master ToDo tab is selected', '- Grid remains fully read-only (no edit tools)', '', '### tests/Invoke-SecurityIntegrityTests.ps1 (new)', '- 10-test security scan suite covering: hardcoded credentials (P001/OWASP A02), Invoke-Expression injection (P010/OWASP A03), path traversal (P009), plaintext private key writes, sensitive keyword exposure in logs, vault access pattern integrity, critical module SHA256 hash baseline verification, privilege escalation indicators, empty catch blocks (P002), UTF-8 BOM check (P006)', '- Outputs structured JSON report to emp/security-integrity-report.json; -FailOnCritical exits with code 1', '', '### tests/PKIChainManager.Tests.ps1 (fleshed out, was stub)', '- Expanded from 3 stub tests to 40+ assertions across 7 Describe blocks: Module Surface, Initialize-PKIChainManager, Pre-initialisation guard, New-RootCACertificate, New-SubordinateCACertificate, New-CodeSignCertificate, Get-PKIChainStatus, Export-CertToVault, New-FullPKIChain', '- Tests use TestDrive temp paths; certs cleaned from store in AfterAll blocks', '- Validates EXPIRING threshold (90 days), Code Signing EKU OID (1.3.6.1.5.5.7.3.3), vault mock isolation', '', '### config/cron-aiathon-schedule.json — CertMonitor task added', '- New task: TASK-CertMonitor — type CertMonitor, frequency 1440 min (daily), enabled by default', '- Scans pki/ folder tree for .cer files, computes days-until-expiry per cert, writes JSON report to ~REPORTS/CertMonitor/', '- Handler in CronAiAthon-Scheduler.psm1: calls Write-CronLog -Severity Warning for EXPIRED/EXPIRING certs', '', '### modules/CronAiAthon-Scheduler.psm1 — CertMonitor switch case', '- Added CertMonitor case in Invoke-CronJob switch (after DepMap); scans PKI path, writes per-run JSON report, logs expired/expiring certs', '', '', '## ⚙ 2026-04-03 — Session 8: Dependency Map v2.0 — URL/IP Scanner, DNS Resolution, XHTML Visualisation, ZIP Archive', '', '### Invoke-WorkspaceDependencyMap.ps1 v2.0 (extended)', '- **Exclusions:** Added `todo/` and `temp/` folders to `$script:ExcludeNames`; added temp/swap extension filter (`.tmp .bak .log .lock .pyc .pyo .cache` and `~`-prefix filenames) to `$allFiles` collection', '- **URL/IP Extraction (Phase 3 + 4):** Added `$urlRegex` and `$ipv4Regex` patterns; every scanned code and config file now has `urls`/`ips` arrays extracted and stored on node objects and in `$urlIpMap` hashtable', '- **DNS Resolution (Phase 4b — new):** Resolves all unique hostnames from extracted URLs via `[System.Net.Dns]::GetHostAddresses()`; stores per-host `{ ips, error, hits }` in `$dnsResolution`; skippable with `-SkipDns`', '- **IP Hit-Rate Table:** Builds `$ipHitRate` mapping each IPv4 (direct refs + DNS-resolved) to all files referencing it; sorted descending by file count as `$ipHitRateList`', '- **ZIP Archive:** Compresses output JSON using `System.IO.Compression.ZipFile` to `workspace-dependency-map-{ts}.zip`; skippable with `-SkipZip`', '- **XHTML Output (full replacement):** Replaced single-tab dark HTML graph with 3-tab XHTML 1.1 document:', ' - **Tab 1 — Graph:** SVG force-directed dependency graph (folder/module/script/config nodes, pan/zoom/filter/relax)', ' - **Tab 2 — Links & IPs:** Filterable/sortable table of every file\'s URLs (clickable ``) and direct IPv4 refs', ' - **Tab 3 — IP Hit Rate:** Filterable/sortable IP frequency table with DNS-resolved hostname column and per-file file list', '- **New JSON fields:** `urlIpByFile`, `dnsResolution`, `ipHitRate`, `summary.urlFileCount`, `summary.uniqueHosts`, `summary.uniqueIPs`', '- **New params:** `-SkipHtml`, `-SkipZip`, `-SkipDns`', '', '### CronAiAthon-Scheduler.psm1 (extended)', '- **Added `\'DepMap\'` task type** to `Invoke-CronJob` switch block — runs `Invoke-WorkspaceDependencyMap.ps1` on schedule', '', '### cron-aiathon-schedule.json (extended)', '- **Added `TASK-DepMap`** — daily (1440 min frequency), type `DepMap`, initially enabled; regenerates dep-map JSON/XHTML/ZIP once per day', '', '### FILES-MANIFEST.md (updated)', '- Added `Invoke-WorkspaceDependencyMap.ps1` entries to both the summary section and the detailed section', '', '---', '', '## 2026-03-28 — Session 7: Cron-Ai-Athon Pipeline, Scheduler, Bug Tracker, EventLog/SYSLOG', '', '### CronAiAthon-Pipeline Module (new)', '- **Created `modules/CronAiAthon-Pipeline.psm1`** — Unified pipeline registry (12 exported functions)', ' - `New-PipelineItem` — Schema: id, type, title, description, priority, status, source, category, sessionModCount', ' - `Initialize-PipelineRegistry` — Creates `config/cron-aiathon-pipeline.json` with schema metadata', ' - `Add-PipelineItem` / `Update-PipelineItemStatus` — CRUD with auto-increment sessionModCount', ' - `Get-PipelineItems` / `Get-PipelineStatistics` — Query and analytics', ' - `Invoke-SinRegistryFeedback` — Compares bugs against sin_registry JSON, creates sins for new patterns', ' - `ConvertTo-Bugs2FIX` / `ConvertTo-Items2ADD` — Type promotion helpers', ' - `Get-CentralMasterToDo` — Aggregates from pipeline, todo/ folder, FeatureRequests JSON, BugTracker JSON', ' - `Export-CentralMasterToDo` — Writes `todo/_master-aggregated.json` with typed/status breakdowns', '', '### CronAiAthon-BugTracker Module (new)', '- **Created `modules/CronAiAthon-BugTracker.psm1`** — 6-vector automated bug detection (8 functions)', ' - `Invoke-ParseCheck` — PowerShell AST parse error scanner across workspace .ps1/.psm1 files', ' - `Invoke-XhtmlValidation` — XHTML well-formedness and tag-balance checking', ' - `Invoke-CrashLogScan` — Scans logs/ for crash/exception/fatal patterns', ' - `Invoke-ErrorTrapAudit` — Finds unprotected file/network/JSON operations without try/catch', ' - `Invoke-DataValidationCheck` — Tests JSON file parse validity across config/ and scripts/', ' - `Invoke-DependencyCheck` — Validates module/script file existence and Requires tags', ' - `Invoke-FullBugScan` — Runs all 6 vectors, returns consolidated results', ' - `Invoke-BugToPipelineProcessor` — Auto-pushes detected bugs into CronAiAthon-Pipeline', '', '### CronAiAthon-Scheduler Module (new)', '- **Created `modules/CronAiAthon-Scheduler.psm1`** — Task scheduling engine (15 functions)', ' - 5 default cron jobs: BugScan (120min), PipelineProcess (60min), MasterAggregate (30min), SinRegistryReview (240min), PreReqCheck (480min)', ' - Job statistics: cycles, errors, itemsDone, bugsFound, testsMade, plansMade, subagentCalls, questions', ' - `Invoke-PreRequisiteCheck` — Validates 7 directories, 4 modules, pipeline config, schedule config', ' - `Invoke-CronJob` / `Invoke-AllCronJobs` — Execute tasks by type or run full cycle', ' - `Add-AutopilotSuggestion` / `Update-AutopilotSuggestionStatus` — Self-improvement tracking', ' - `Register-SubagentCall` / `Register-Question` — Cross-agent call tally and question registry', '', '### CronAiAthon-EventLog Module (new)', '- **Created `modules/CronAiAthon-EventLog.psm1`** — Windows Event Log + SYSLOG (8 functions)', ' - `Register-EventLogSources` — PowerShellGUI-CRON, PowerShellGUI-CORE in Application log', ' - `Write-CronEventLog` — Tagged with SYSLOG severity (Emergency=0 through Debug=7)', ' - `Send-SyslogMessage` — RFC 5424 UDP 161 primary, TCP 161 fallback', ' - `Write-SyslogFile` — Local `logs/PowerShellGUI.SYSLOG` file', ' - `Write-CronLog` — Unified: EventLog + .SYSLOG + optional network forwarding', ' - SYSLOG severity-to-EventLog mapping: 0-3=Error, 4=Warning, 5-7=Information', '', '### Show-CronAiAthonTool GUI (new)', '- **Created `scripts/Show-CronAiAthonTool.ps1`** — 12-tab WinForms dashboard', ' - Tab 1: Dashboard overview (metrics, queue, statistics, questions summary)', ' - Tab 2: Task Schedule (DataGridView, global frequency, load/apply)', ' - Tab 3: Pre-Req Checks (pass/fail/warn colored results)', ' - Tab 4: Manual Runner (select task, run selected/all, RichTextBox results)', ' - Tab 5: Pipeline Queue (filter by type/status, DataGridView)', ' - Tab 6: Bug Tracker (full scan, push to pipeline)', ' - Tab 7: Master ToDo (aggregate from 4 sources)', ' - Tab 8: Statistics (metrics + job history last 50)', ' - Tab 9: Subagent Tally (per-agent call counts)', ' - Tab 10: Questions (tally, register new: autopilot/commander/unanswered)', ' - Tab 11: Autopilot Suggestions (add/track implemented/pending/rejected/blocked)', ' - Tab 12: Event Log/SYSLOG (source registration, server config, test forward, .SYSLOG viewer)', ' - Dark theme (VS Code palette), Segoe UI fonts, flat buttons, tooltips on all controls', '', '### Main-GUI Integration', '- **Main-GUI.ps1** — Added Cron-Ai-Athon Tool menu item in Tools menu after WinRemote PS Tool', '- Updated GUI Layout comment with Cron-Ai-Athon Tool line', '', '### Framework Documentation Updates', '- Updated FILES-MANIFEST.md (4 new module entries, 1 script entry, Main-GUI features, sessionModCount on all entries)', '- Updated VERSION-UPDATES.md (v2603.B0.v27.0 entry)', '- Updated ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md (this entry)', '', '', '### MD Style Standardization (20 files)', '- **Converted all 20 workspace .md files** from `# VersionTag:` headers to `` HTML comment blocks', '- **Standardized titles** to `# PowerShellGUI - {Title}` format with `` metadata', '- **Added iconography palette** to REFERENCE-CONSISTENCY-STANDARD.md (15 emoji mappings per section type)', '- **Added canonical header template** (section 6a) for all future .md files', '', '### Cryptographic File Change Tracking (new)', '- **Created `scripts/Invoke-FileChangeTracker.ps1`** — HMAC-SHA256 signed file change ledger', ' - `Initialize-ChangeKey` — 32-byte random key with NTFS ACL restriction', ' - `Get-FileChangeHMAC` — HMAC-SHA256 of hashBefore|hashAfter|epoch|agent', ' - `New-FileChangeRecord` — UUID, ISO-8601 timestamps, SHA256 hashes, HMAC signature', ' - `Test-ChangeRecord` / `Invoke-LedgerVerify` — verify individual or all records', ' - `Show-ChangeLedger` — display with [VALID]/[TAMPERED] badges', ' - `Update-WorkspaceReferences` — cascade filename changes across workspace', ' - `Invoke-RoundTripTest` — self-test with temp file creation and verification', '- **Created `logs/file-change-ledger.json`** — append-only signed ledger', '- **Created `config/file-change-key.bin`** — auto-generated on first use', '', '### Naming Convention Governance (new)', '- **Created `scripts/Invoke-RenameProposal.ps1`** — naming convention scanner', ' - 70+ approved PowerShell verbs, PascalCase modules, kebab-case config, no-spaces rules', ' - `-ScanOnly`, `-DryRun`, `-Execute` modes with auto-todo creation and dedup checking', ' - Auto-calls `Invoke-TodoManager.ps1 -Reindex` after creating rename proposal todos', '', '### 48-Hour Cyclic Scheduled Task (new)', '- **Created `scripts/Invoke-CyclicRenameCheck.ps1`** — wrapper with state tracking', ' - Logs to `logs/cyclic-rename-check.log`, updates `config/cyclic-tasks.json`', '- **Created `scripts/Register-CyclicRenameTask.ps1`** — Windows Task Scheduler registration', ' - Task: `PwShGUI-CyclicRenameCheck`, 48hr interval, 15-min execution limit', ' - `-Unregister`, `-Status` switches (mirrors Register-CronTask.ps1 pattern)', '- **Created `config/cyclic-tasks.json`** — cyclic task state tracking', '', '### XHTML Hub Integration', '- **XHTML-MasterToDo.xhtml** — Added 2 Systematic Routines entries: Rename Proposal Check, File Change Ledger', '- with error trapping, `window.onerror` auto-bug creation, manual click logging', '- **Added 4 new scripts to SCRIPTS array** for bug tracker script dropdown', '', '### Framework Documentation Cascade', '- Updated FILES-MANIFEST.md (7 new entries: 4 scripts, 2 config, 1 log)', '- Updated INDEX.md (4 new scripts in directory tree)', '- Updated WORKSPACE-INVENTORY-CANONICAL.md (new component area + 7 files)', '- Updated SYSTEM-INTERCONNECTION-MAP.md (expanded Mermaid graph with 12 new nodes)', '- Updated ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md (this entry)', '- Updated VERSION-UPDATES.md (v2603.B0.v27.0 entry)', '', '### Parse Status', '- Invoke-FileChangeTracker.ps1: ✅ PASS', '- Invoke-RenameProposal.ps1: ✅ PASS', '- Invoke-CyclicRenameCheck.ps1: ✅ PASS', '- Register-CyclicRenameTask.ps1: ✅ PASS', '', '---', '', '## 2026-03-11 — Session 5: Performance Optimization, AVPN Tracker, Vault Operations, Feature-to-ToDo, Source-of-Truth Pass', '', '### Performance Improvements', '- **Workspace File Cache** (`Main-GUI.ps1`): Added `$script:_FileListCache` with 120-second TTL', ' - `Get-CachedScriptFiles` — cached *.ps1/*.psm1/*.psd1 scan', ' - `Get-CachedAllFiles` — cached full-workspace scan with config exclusions', ' - `Clear-FileListCache` — manual invalidation after file create/delete', ' - Centralized `$script:_ScanExclude` = `.git`, `.history`, `node_modules`, `~REPORTS\\archive`', '- **Replaced 5 workspace-wide `Get-ChildItem -Recurse` scans** with cached versions:', ' - `Update-VersionTag`, `Test-VersionTag`, `New-BuildManifest` → `Get-CachedAllFiles`', ' - `Test-AppTesting`, `Test-ScriptSafetySecOp` → `Get-CachedScriptFiles`', '', '### AVPN Tracker Enhancements (`modules/AVPN-Tracker.psm1`)', '- **Unique connector shapes** per device category: circle (AV), rectangle (Power), diamond (Network), rounded-rect (USB)', '- **Right-click context menu** on output connectors for quick-connect to available inputs', '- **Auto Plug All button** with yellow warning flash for unpowered devices', '- **Canvas zero-padding** for 2nd column pane alignment', '', '### AVPN Device Templates (`config/AVPN_device-types.json`)', '- **Replaced 12 templates with 15 new standardized types** with `interfaceLabels` arrays', '- Types: Switch, Router, Firewall, WAP, Desktop PC, Laptop, Server, Thin Client, 4× Crestron (DMPS, AM-200, DM TX/RX), Power Distribution, UPS, Other', '', '### Vault Operations & Security (`Main-GUI.ps1`, `modules/AssistedSASC.psm1`)', '- **Import Secrets fix**: Added format picker dialog (CSV/JSON/XML) for `-Format` parameter', '- **BW CLI error check**: `Import-VaultSecrets` now validates result for errors and empty responses', '- **Vault Operations flyout** submenu: Save Secret, Retrieve Secret, Create New, Generate Random (15-char)', '- **Replaced Microsoft.VisualBasic.InputBox** with pure WinForms dialog', '- **InvokerItems fix**: `$script:_InvokerItems` initialized to `@()` before try/catch', '', '### UI Improvements', '- **Scan Dashboard** (`scripts/Show-ScanDashboard.ps1`): Fixed WinForms Dock Z-order on all 3 tab types', '- **Status bar**: 50/50 split (350px + 350px at x=350)', '- **Vault status colors**: Unlocked=Green, Locked=Yellow/DarkGoldenrod+LightYellow bg, LockedOut=White on Black, Unavailable=Red+MistyRose', '- **Immediate vault status update** after unlock (no 5s timer delay)', '', '### Feature-to-ToDo Automation', '- **New script**: `scripts/ConvertTo-FeatureToDo.ps1` — reads exported FeatureRequests JSON backup, converts Proposed/ALPHA features to `todo/` directory JSON items, dedup by `source_feature_id`', '- **XHTML Export-ToDo button**: Added to XHTML-FeatureRequests.xhtml toolbar for one-click Proposed/ALPHA export', '', '### Documentation & Source-of-Truth', '- **FILES-MANIFEST.md**: Complete function inventory for all 8 modules (54 exported, 125+ internal, with purpose tables)', '- **VERSION-UPDATES.md**: Added v2603.B0.v27.0 release notes', '- **INDEX.md**: Updated version, stats table, tracking section with new ConvertTo-FeatureToDo reference', '- **XHTML SCRIPTS array**: Added ConvertTo-FeatureToDo.ps1', '- All documentation cross-references updated to v2603.B0.v27.0', '', '### Parse Status', '- Main-GUI.ps1: ✅ PASS', '- modules/AVPN-Tracker.psm1: ✅ PASS', '- modules/AssistedSASC.psm1: ✅ PASS', '- scripts/Show-ScanDashboard.ps1: ✅ PASS', '- scripts/ConvertTo-FeatureToDo.ps1: ✅ PASS (new)', '- config/AVPN_device-types.json: ✅ PASS', '- scripts/XHTML-Checker/XHTML-FeatureRequests.xhtml: ✅ PASS', '', '### Smoke Test', '- Baseline: 33 PASS, 0 FAIL, 1 WARN', '', '---', '', '## 2026-03-10 — Session 4: Testing Routine Builder, Cross-Linked Tracking Hub', '', '### Testing Routine Builder', '- Created `scripts/XHTML-Checker/XHTML-TestingRoutineBuilder.xhtml`: Interactive XHTML form with 22 test condition types.', ' - Two-panel layout (left: step builder, right: results)', ' - Add/edit/delete/reorder test steps with label, parameter, and remediation fields', ' - Save/Load JSON templates to `config/CONFIG-TEMPLATES/TESTING-TEMPLATES/`', ' - TEST-ONLY and TEST-REMEDIATION buttons', ' - Color-coded results: GREEN=pass, RED=fail, YELLOW=error', ' - Summary bar with pass/fail/error counts', ' - Browser-side simulation for timezone/language; PS backend for OS-level tests', '- Created `scripts/Invoke-TestRoutine.ps1`: PowerShell backend runner for all 22 test types.', ' - Dispatch table architecture for extensibility', ' - `-Remediate` switch executes IF-FAIL remediation commands per step', ' - `-OutputJson` exports results to `~REPORTS/`', ' - Color-coded console output (Green/Red/Yellow)', '- Created `config/CONFIG-TEMPLATES/TESTING-TEMPLATES/example-baseline.json`: 9-step sample template.', '- Test types: FileExists, FolderExists, FolderWritable, ServiceRunning, ServiceExists, AppInstalled, AppRunning, AppVersionHigher, UserIsAdmin, RemotePathAccessible, DriveMappingExists, DNSForward, DNSReverse, TimezoneEquals, LanguageEquals, RegionEquals, UserExists, UserIsLocalAdmin, BiosVersionHigher, WinRMEnabled, WinRMSecured, WinVersionCurrent.', '', '### FeatureRequests XHTML — Testing Tab Integration', '- Added 4th tab "Testing Routine Builder" to `scripts/XHTML-Checker/XHTML-FeatureRequests.xhtml`.', '- Embedded `XHTML-TestingRoutineBuilder.xhtml` via iframe.', '- Added sidebar links: Testing Routine Builder, Checklists Dashboard.', '- Updated SCRIPTS array with 10 new file entries for manifest coverage.', '', '### Cross-Linked Tracking Hub', '- FeatureRequests XHTML now serves as 4-tab hub: Features, ToDos, Bugs, Testing Routine Builder.', '- All tracking documents interlinked: Checklists → FeatureRequests, FeatureRequests → BugTracker, Testing → FILES-MANIFEST.', '- `FILES-MANIFEST.md`: Added 3 new file entries + TESTING-TEMPLATES directory.', '- `README.md`: Added Testing Routine Builder to Core Features, Documentation Map.', '- `VERSION-UPDATES.md`: Added v2603.B0.v27.0 entry.', '- `INDEX.md`: Added Testing Routine Builder and Checklists cross-references.', '', '### Documentation Updates', '- Updated `README.md`, `INDEX.md`, `FILES-MANIFEST.md`, `ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md`, `VERSION-UPDATES.md` with cross-links.', '', '---', '', '## 2026-03-09 — Session 3: Audit Fixes, App Template Manager, Scan Dashboard, XHTML Repair', '', '### Audit Recommendation Fixes (R1–R7 + Remaining)', '- `PwShGUICore.psm1` L283: `Write-Host` replaced with `Write-AppLog` in `Wait-KeyOrTimeout`.', '- `SASC-Adapters.psm1` L271: Security comment added for mRemoteNG temp XML password handling.', '- `Start-FocalPoint.ps1` L28: Hardcoded `C:\\PowerShellGUI` replaced with `$PSScriptRoot`-based path.', '- `AssistedSASC.psm1` L72: Constants externalized via `config/sasc-tuning.json` override file.', '- `Main-GUI.ps1`: Added `Write-AppLog` completion logging to both progress functions.', '- `Main-GUI.ps1`: `Measure-Object` single-pass optimization in WinGets installed-packages tab.', '', '### APP-INSTALL-TEMPLATES Feature', '- Created `config/APP-INSTALL-TEMPLATES/` with 3 JSON template files:', ' - `office-productivity.json` (7 apps)', ' - `dev-tools.json` (8 apps)', ' - `security-it-admin.json` (8 apps)', '- Built `scripts/Show-AppTemplateManager.ps1`: 3-pane WinForms GUI', ' - Pane 1: Load/Save/Browse JSON templates with checkbox app list', ' - Pane 2: Gap analysis (missing/outdated detection, color-coded)', ' - Pane 3: Installed apps grid, search, save-as-template, check-updates', '- Integrated into Main-GUI.ps1 → WinGets menu → "App Template Manager..."', '', '### Scan Dashboard Feature', '- Built `scripts/Show-ScanDashboard.ps1`: multi-tab WinForms scan center', ' - 7 per-scan tabs: EnvScanner, DepMatrix, OrphanAudit, OrphanCleanup, XhtmlTriage, ReportRetention, RefIntegrity', ' - Summary tab with file counts, disk sizes, cleanup actions', ' - Reports tab with per-format links (greyed when no data)', '- Integrated into Main-GUI.ps1 → Tools menu → "Scan Dashboard..."', '', '### XHTML VersionTag Repair', '- Fixed 3 XHTML files with invalid Markdown-style `# VersionTag:` lines:', ' - `scripts/XHTML-Checker/XHTML-code-analysis.xhtml`', ' - `scripts/XHTML-Checker/XHTML-FeatureRequests.xhtml`', ' - `UPM/docs/UPM-UserGuide.xhtml`', '- Converted to proper XML comment `` and repositioned below `` declaration.', '- Smoke test: 31 PASS, 0 FAIL, 1 WARN (PS 5.1 compat known).', '', '### Documentation Updates', '- `README.md`: Updated Core Features, Directory Structure, Documentation Map, Security Notes.', '- `INDEX.md`: Updated version to 2603.B0.v27.0, added Secrets, App Template Manager, Scan Dashboard sections.', '- `FILES-MANIFEST.md`: Added 6 new file entries (2 scripts, 4 JSON configs).', '- `ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md`: This session entry.', '', '---', '', '## 2026-03-02 — Locked Next Phase + Pre-Phase Integrity Updates', '', '- Next phase locked: **Startup Phase 4 hardening**.', '- Execution policy locked: proceed with affirmative assumptions for follow-up input requests during processing, and record assumptions in generated outputs.', '- Pre-phase improvement implemented in runtime: orphan-audit artifacts are now generated from the inventory/drift pipeline as timestamped JSON + Markdown in `~REPORTS/`.', '- UPM ownership convention recorded: `modules/UserProfileManager.psm1` is canonical implementation, `scripts/UserProfile-Manager.ps1` canonical launcher, `UPM/UserProfile-Manager.ps1` compatibility wrapper.', '', '## 2026-03-02 — Phase Start Execution (Affirmative Flow)', '', '- Executed affirmative cleanup start for inventory/drift orphan candidates.', '- Added `scripts/Invoke-OrphanCleanup.ps1` and ran in apply mode for safe temp artifacts.', '- Cleanup result: 5 planned deletions, 5 applied deletions.', '- Re-ran orphan audit after cleanup: candidate count reduced from 26 to 12.', '- Remaining candidates are report/history artifacts in `~REPORTS/` pending explicit keep/archive/delete policy.', '', '## 2026-03-02 — Phase 5 Complete (Report Retention + Reference-Aware Triage)', '', '- Added reference-aware orphan triage in `scripts/Invoke-OrphanAudit.ps1` with per-candidate `ReferenceCount` and `ZeroReference` flags.', '- Added `scripts/Invoke-ReportRetention.ps1` and executed retention sweeps to archive stale generated orphan/report artifacts under `~REPORTS/archive/`.', '- Aligned runtime drift checks in `Main-GUI.ps1` to ignore generated orphan/retention artifacts (`orphan-audit-*`, `orphan-cleanup-*`, `report-retention-*`) to prevent self-referential noise.', '- Final reference-aware orphan baseline generated: `~REPORTS/orphan-audit-core-20260302-230853.md`.', '- Final state: **6** inventory/drift candidates, **0** zero-reference candidates (all six are referenced XHTML report exports).', '', '## 2026-03-02 — XHTML Auto-Classification Applied', '', '- Executed `scripts/Invoke-XhtmlReportTriage.ps1 -Apply` with affirmative processing defaults.', '- Classification policy applied: keep canonical consolidated XHTML export, archive component-detail XHTML exports.', '- Result: 6 targets processed, 1 kept, 5 archived to `~REPORTS/archive/xhtml-triage-/`.', '- Post-triage orphan baseline regenerated and reduced to **3** candidates.', '', '---', '', '## 🔧 Issues Fixed', '', '### Issue 1: No GUI Displayed on Startup', '**Problem:** GUI window wasn\'t appearing when application started ', '**Root Cause:** `[void]$form.ShowDialog()` was suppressing the dialog output ', '**Solution:** Changed to `$form.ShowDialog() | Out-Null` to properly display the form', '', '### Issue 2: Insufficient Event Logging', '**Problem:** Lack of detailed event tracking for user interactions ', '**Solution:** Added comprehensive event logging throughout the application', '', '---', '', '## ✨ Enhancements Made', '', '### New Log Levels', 'Added two new logging levels for better visibility:', '', '| Level | Color | Purpose |', '|-------|-------|---------|', '| **Event** | Cyan | User interactions and important events |', '| **Debug** | Gray | Detailed diagnostic information |', '', '### Events Now Logged', '', '#### GUI Interactions', '- Button clicks with script name and display name', '- Menu selections (File, Tests, Links, WinGets, Tools, Help)', '- About dialog access', '', '#### Admin Elevation', '- Admin elevation prompt display', '- User response (YES/NO)', '- Elevation request details', '', '#### Configuration & Logs', '- Config file initialization', '- Config file viewing attempts', '- Logs directory access', '', '#### Application Lifecycle', '- Application startup with system info', '- GUI form display', '- GUI form closure', '- Application shutdown', '', '#### Script Execution', '- Script launch requests', '- Script name and display name', '- Admin elevation status', '- Execution completion', '', '---', '', '## 📋 Detailed Changes by Function', '', '### 1. Write-Log Function', '**Location:** Lines 11-32 ', '**Changes:**', '- Added "Debug" and "Event" to ValidateSet', '- Added color handling for Event (Cyan) and Debug (Gray)', '', '**Before:**', '```powershell', '[ValidateSet("Info", "Warning", "Error", "Success")]', '```', '', '**After:**', '```powershell', '[ValidateSet("Info", "Warning", "Error", "Success", "Debug", "Event")]', '```', '', '---', '', '### 2. Show-ElevationPrompt Function', '**Location:** Lines 125-140 ', '**Changes:**', '- Logs when prompt is displayed', '- Logs user response (YES/NO)', '', '**Added Logging:**', '```powershell', 'Write-Log "Displaying admin elevation prompt for script: $ScriptName" "Event"', '...', 'Write-Log "Admin elevation response: $(if ($shouldElevate) { \'YES\' } else { \'NO\' })" "Event"', '```', '', '---', '', '### 3. File Menu Exit', '**Location:** Lines 236-242 ', '**Changes:**', '- Logs when user selects File > Exit', '', '**Added Logging:**', '```powershell', 'Write-Log "User selected File > Exit" "Event"', '```', '', '---', '', '### 4. Tools Menu - View Config', '**Location:** Lines 245-256 ', '**Changes:**', '- Logs menu selection', '- Logs config file access', '', '**Added Logging:**', '```powershell', 'Write-Log "User selected Tools > View Config" "Event"', 'Write-Log "Opening config file: $configFile" "Debug"', '```', '', '---', '', '### 5. Tools Menu - Open Logs', '**Location:** Lines 259-267 ', '**Changes:**', '- Logs menu selection', '- Logs logs directory access', '', '**Added Logging:**', '```powershell', 'Write-Log "User selected Tools > Open Logs Directory" "Event"', 'Write-Log "Opening logs directory: $logsDir" "Debug"', '```', '', '---', '', '### 6. Help Menu - About', '**Location:** Lines 270-283 ', '**Changes:**', '- Logs when About dialog is accessed', '', '**Added Logging:**', '```powershell', 'Write-Log "User selected Help > About" "Event"', '```', '', '---', '', '### 7. Button Click Handler', '**Location:** Lines 308-320 ', '**Changes:**', '- Logs button click with display name and script name', '- Fixed display name retrieval', '', '**Added Logging:**', '```powershell', '$displayName = $buttonNames | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq $scriptName } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty DisplayName', 'Write-Log "Button clicked: $displayName ($scriptName)" "Event"', '```', '', '---', '', '### 8. GUI Form Display', '**Location:** Lines 319-324 ', '**Changes:**', '- Fixed ShowDialog suppression', '- Added event logging for form display and closure', '- Added comprehensive error handling', '', '**Before:**', '```powershell', '[void]$form.ShowDialog()', '```', '', '**After:**', '```powershell', 'Write-Log "Displaying GUI form window" "Event"', '$form.ShowDialog() | Out-Null', 'Write-Log "GUI form closed by user" "Event"', '```', '', '---', '', '### 9. Main Execution Block', '**Location:** Lines 347-365 ', '**Changes:**', '- Added separator lines for log readability', '- Enhanced startup logging', '- Added try-catch error handling', '- More detailed system information in logs', '', '**Added Logging:**', '```powershell', 'Write-Log "=====================================================================" "Event"', 'Write-Log "PowerShell GUI Application starting..." "Info"', 'Write-Log "Computer: $env:COMPUTERNAME | User: $env:USERNAME | PowerShell: $($PSVersionTable.PSVersion)" "Info"', 'try {', ' Create-GUI', '}', 'catch {', ' Write-Log "Error in GUI creation: $_" "Error"', '}', '```', '', '---', '', '## 📊 Sample Log Output', '', '### Before Enhancement', '```', '[2026-01-24 19:02:23] [Info] PowerShell GUI Application starting...', '[2026-01-24 19:02:24] [Success] System variables config created successfully', '[2026-01-24 19:03:44] [Info] Launching script: Script1 (RunAsAdmin: True)', '[2026-01-24 19:03:48] [Success] Script execution completed: Script1', '```', '', '### After Enhancement', '```', '[2026-01-25 10:30:00] [Event] =====================================================================', '[2026-01-25 10:30:00] [Info] PowerShell GUI Application starting...', '[2026-01-25 10:30:00] [Info] Computer: WORKSTATION | User: admin | PowerShell: 5.1.26100.7462', '[2026-01-25 10:30:00] [Event] =====================================================================', '[2026-01-25 10:30:01] [Event] Initializing config file...', '[2026-01-25 10:30:02] [Success] System variables config created successfully', '[2026-01-25 10:30:02] [Event] Displaying GUI form window', '[2026-01-25 10:30:15] [Event] Button clicked: Database Maintenance (Script1)', '[2026-01-25 10:30:15] [Event] Displaying admin elevation prompt for script: Script1', '[2026-01-25 10:30:18] [Event] Admin elevation response: YES', '[2026-01-25 10:30:20] [Info] Launching script: Script1 (RunAsAdmin: True)', '[2026-01-25 10:30:25] [Success] Script execution completed: Script1', '[2026-01-25 10:30:30] [Event] User selected Tools > View Config', '[2026-01-25 10:30:30] [Debug] Opening config file: C:\\PowerShellGUI\\config\\system-variables.xml', '[2026-01-25 10:30:45] [Event] User selected File > Exit', '[2026-01-25 10:30:45] [Event] GUI form closed by user', '[2026-01-25 10:30:45] [Event] =====================================================================', '[2026-01-25 10:30:45] [Info] PowerShell GUI Application closed', '[2026-01-25 10:30:45] [Event] =====================================================================', '```', '', '---', '', '## 🎯 Benefits', '', '### For Users', '- ✅ GUI now displays properly', '- ✅ Clear visibility into all actions', '- ✅ Better troubleshooting capabilities', '- ✅ Audit trail of user interactions', '', '### For Administrators', '- ✅ Comprehensive activity logs', '- ✅ Easy debugging with debug-level logs', '- ✅ Event-based tracking of user actions', '- ✅ Better compliance and audit requirements', '', '### For Developers', '- ✅ Easier to diagnose issues', '- ✅ Clear separation of event types', '- ✅ Better error context with color coding', '- ✅ Detailed trace of execution flow', '', '---', '', '## 🧪 Testing Checklist', '', '- [x] GUI displays on startup', '- [x] Button clicks are logged with event-level detail', '- [x] Menu items log events when clicked', '- [x] Admin elevation prompts log user responses', '- [x] Config file operations are tracked', '- [x] Script execution is fully logged', '- [x] Application startup/shutdown logged', '- [x] Color coding works in console', '- [x] Error handling captures exceptions', '- [x] Debug logs provide detailed info', '', '---', '', '## 📈 Log Volume Impact', '', '### Estimated Log Growth', '- **Per Application Startup:** ~15-20 KB', '- **Per Button Click:** ~0.5 KB', '- **Per Script Execution:** ~2-5 KB', '- **Per Day (10 sessions):** ~50-100 KB', '', '### Recommendation', 'Archive logs older than 30 days to manage disk space.', '', '---', '', '## 🔄 Version History', '', '### v1.0.1 (Current) - January 25, 2026', '- ✅ Fixed GUI display issue', '- ✅ Added Event log level', '- ✅ Added Debug log level', '- ✅ Comprehensive event logging throughout', '- ✅ Enhanced error handling', '- ✅ Better startup/shutdown logging', '', '### v1.0.0 - January 24, 2026', '- Initial release', '', '---', '', '## 🚀 Usage', '', '### Run the Application', '```bash', '# Option 1: Double-click', 'Launch-GUI.bat', '', '# Option 2: PowerShell', 'powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File Main-GUI.ps1', '```', '', '### View Logs', '```bash', '# Open logs directory', 'Get-ChildItem C:\\PowerShellGUI\\logs\\', '', '# View today\'s log', 'Get-Content "C:\\PowerShellGUI\\logs\\COMPUTERNAME-$(Get-Date -Format \'yyyy-MM-dd\').log"', '', '# View specific event types', 'Get-Content "C:\\PowerShellGUI\\logs\\*.log" | Where-Object { $_ -match \'\\[Event\\]\' }', '```', '', '### Filter Logs by Level', '```powershell', '# Show only events', 'Get-Content "C:\\PowerShellGUI\\logs\\*.log" | Where-Object { $_ -match \'\\[Event\\]\' }', '', '# Show only errors', 'Get-Content "C:\\PowerShellGUI\\logs\\*.log" | Where-Object { $_ -match \'\\[Error\\]\' }', '', '# Show only debug info', 'Get-Content "C:\\PowerShellGUI\\logs\\*.log" | Where-Object { $_ -match \'\\[Debug\\]\' }', '```', '', '---', '', '## 📞 Support', '', 'All features are working as designed. For questions:', '1. Check the logs for detailed event tracking', '2. Review the README.md for comprehensive documentation', '3. Check SETUP-GUIDE.md for configuration options', '', '---', '', '**Status: ✅ Ready for Production Use**', '', '---', '', '## 🆕 Version 2602.a.7+ Updates - February 14, 2026', '', '### Major Enhancements Summary', '', '| Feature | Description | Date Added |', '|---------|-------------|------------|', '| Documentation Reorganization | All MD files moved to `~README.md/` subdirectory | 2026-02-14 |', '| Help Index System | HTML iframe-based documentation browser | 2026-02-14 |', '| Conditional Version Auto-Increment | Version check runs BEFORE auto-increment with user prompt | 2026-02-14 |', '| Tests Menu | New dropdown menu with 7 testing functions | 2026-02-14 |', '| Links Menu | Dynamic XML-driven URL categories | 2026-02-14 |', '| WinGets Menu | Package management via WinGet CLI | 2026-02-14 |', '| App Testing Routine | Documentation & comment consistency checker | 2026-02-14 |', '| Safety Scrutiny Routine | Script safety scanner with scoring (0-100) | 2026-02-14 |', '| Safety Badge | Real-time script safety display in elevation prompt | 2026-02-14 |', '| Auto WhatIf | Scripts scoring >50 run with `-WhatIf` when supported | 2026-02-14 |', '', '---', '', '### 🗂️ Documentation Reorganization', '', '**What Changed:**', '- Created `~README.md/` subdirectory', '- Moved 10 markdown files from root to subdirectory', '- Updated version exclusions in `config/system-variables.xml`', '', '**Files Moved:**', '1. README.md', '2. QUICK-START.md', '3. SETUP-GUIDE.md', '4. NETWORK-TOOLS-GUIDE.md', '5. AVPN-TRACKER-GUIDE.md', '6. VERSION-UPDATES.md', '7. INDEX.md', '8. INSTALLATION-SUMMARY.md', '9. FILES-MANIFEST.md', '10. ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md', '', '**New File Created:**', '- `STARTUP-BEHAVIOR.md` - Documents the new conditional version check flow', '', '---', '', '### 📚 Help Index System', '', '**File:** `~README.md/PwShGUI-Help-Index.html`', '', '**Features:**', '- Dark theme matching VS Code aesthetics', '- Left-side navigation with category grouping', '- Right-side iframe content display', '- Active link highlighting', '- Categories:', ' - Getting Started', ' - Configuration & Setup', ' - Tools & Features', ' - Updates & History', '', '**Menu Integration:**', '- Added "PwShGUI App &Help (Webpage Index)" to Help menu', '- Opens in default browser', '- Direct file path validation', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 1469-1480', '', '---', '', '### 🔄 Conditional Version Auto-Increment', '', '**What Changed:**', '- Version check now runs FIRST before any auto-increment', '- User prompted only when mismatches detected', '- Color-coded console output (Blue=match, Red=mismatch)', '- User types "AA" to authorize increment', '- No timeout - user control over increment decision', '', '**Flow:**', '1. **Phase 1:** `Test-VersionTag` scans all files', '2. **Phase 2:** Parse XML diff for mismatches', '3. **Phase 3:** Display results:', ' - **All Match:** Blue message, skip increment', ' - **Mismatches:** Red message, list issues, prompt for "AA"', '4. **Phase 4:** Generate manifest', '5. **Phase 5:** Display system info', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 1599-1673', '', '---', '', '### 🧪 Tests Menu', '', '**New Dropdown Menu with 7 Items:**', '', '#### 1. Version Check', '- Runs `Test-VersionTag`', '- Generates XML diff report', '- Shows dialog on completion', '', '#### 2. Network Diagnostics', '- Tests connectivity to DNS servers', '- Shows local/gateway/WAN IPs', '- Displays results in message box', '', '#### 3. Disk Check', '- Checkbox dialog for drive selection', '- Runs `chkdsk /f` with admin elevation', '- Supports multiple drives', '', '#### 4. Privacy Check', '- Opens `ms-settings:privacy`', '- Quick access to Windows privacy settings', '', '#### 5. System Check', '- Runs `sfc /detectonly` in hidden window', '- Parses output for corruption', '- Prompts to run `sfc /scannow` if issues found', '', '#### 6. App Testing (Docs & Comments)', '- Scans markdown files for:', ' - Duplicate headings/paragraphs', ' - Missing headings', ' - TODO/TBD markers', ' - Possible contradictions', '- Scans script comments for:', ' - Duplicates', ' - Stale paths', ' - Contradictions', '- Generates timestamped report', '- Auto-opens latest report', '', '#### 7. Scrutiny Safety & SecOps', '- Scans all scripts recursively', '- Assigns safety score (0-100)', '- Detects risky patterns:', ' - Invoke-Expression', ' - Download and Execute', ' - Execution Policy Changes', ' - Recursive Force Delete', ' - Registry Edits', ' - Service Control', ' - Scheduled Tasks', ' - System Power Commands', '- Detects possible secrets', '- Logs full file paths', '- Generates timestamped report', '- Auto-opens latest report', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 1274-1342', '', '---', '', '### 🔗 Links Menu', '', '**Configuration:** `config/links.xml`', '', '**Features:**', '- XML-driven dynamic menu', '- Category-based organization', '- Launches URLs in default browser', '- Easy to add/edit links', '', '**Default Categories:**', '1. **CORPORATE** - Intranet, HR Portal', '2. **PUBLIC-INFO** - Company Site', '3. **LOCAL** - Dashboard', '4. **M365** - Outlook, OneDrive, Teams, SharePoint', '5. **SEARCH** - Bing, Google', '6. **USERS-URLS** - User Link 1', '', '**Functions:**', '- `Initialize-LinksConfigFile` - Creates default XML', '- `Get-LinksConfig` - Loads XML', '- `Build-LinksMenu` - Populates menu dynamically', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 272-323, 1345-1349', '', '---', '', '### 📦 WinGets Menu', '', '**3 Menu Items:**', '', '#### 1. Installed Apps (Grid View)', '- Enumerates registry uninstall keys', '- Displays in Out-GridView', '- Columns:', ' - Name', ' - Publisher', ' - Version', ' - Install Date', ' - Last Updated', ' - Last Executed (blank - reserved)', ' - Size (MB)', '- Supports sorting/filtering', '', '#### 2. Detect Updates (Check-Only)', '- Runs `winget upgrade` in hidden window', '- Saves output to timestamped log', '- Opens log file automatically', '', '#### 3. Update All (Admin Options)', '- Dialog with radio buttons:', ' - AUTO: Accepts all agreements', ' - BUG: Prompts per package', '- Admin elevation checkbox', '- Runs `winget upgrade --all`', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 397-490, 1352-1377', '', '---', '', '### 🛡️ Safety Scoring System', '', '**Function:** `Get-ScriptSafetyScore`', '', '**Scoring Logic:**', '- Starts at 100 (perfectly safe)', '- Deducts penalty for each risky pattern found', '- Min score: 0, Max score: 100', '', '**Penalty Values:**', '', '| Pattern | Penalty |', '|---------|--------|', '| Invoke-Expression | 12 |', '| Download and Execute | 18 |', '| Execution Policy Change | 8 |', '| Recursive Force Delete | 10 |', '| RunAs Elevation | 8 |', '| Scheduled Task | 10 |', '| Security Settings | 8 |', '| Service Control | 8 |', '| System Power | 10 |', '| Registry Edit | 10 |', '| Password/API Key/Secret | 20 each |', '', '**Integration:**', '- Logged before script execution', '- Used to determine `-WhatIf` usage', '- Displayed in safety badge', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 1074-1131', '', '---', '', '### 🏷️ Safety Badge in Elevation Prompt', '', '**What It Shows:**', '- Script safety score (0-100)', '- Color coding:', ' - 🟢 Green: 80-100 (Safe)', ' - 🟡 Yellow: 50-79 (Moderate)', ' - 🔴 Red: 0-49 (Risky)', '- Auto `-WhatIf` indicator', '- Key findings summary', '', '**Example Prompt:**', '```', '╔══════════════════════════════════════╗', '║ Admin Elevation Request ║', '╠══════════════════════════════════════╣', '║ Script: Script4.ps1 ║', '║ Safety Score: 82/100 🟢 ║', '║ Status: Safe to run ║', '╚══════════════════════════════════════╝', '', 'Run with administrator privileges?', '```', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 850-890 (to be updated)', '', '---', '', '### ⚠️ Auto WhatIf for Moderate Scripts', '', '**Logic:**', '- Scripts with safety score > 50 automatically get `-WhatIf`', '- Only if script supports `-WhatIf` parameter', '- Logged before execution', '- Applied to both admin and non-admin runs', '', '**Code Integration:**', '```powershell', '$supportsWhatIf = $cmd.Parameters.ContainsKey(\'WhatIf\')', '$useWhatIf = ($safetyScore -gt 50 -and $supportsWhatIf)', '', 'if ($useWhatIf) {', ' & $scriptPath -WhatIf', '} else {', ' & $scriptPath', '}', '```', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 823-855', '', '---', '', '### 📊 Enhanced System Information Display', '', '**New Output After Startup:**', '```', '=== END SYSTEM INFORMATION ===', 'Root Path: C:\\PowerShellGUI', 'Scripts: C:\\PowerShellGUI\\scripts', 'Build from Config: 2602.a.7', 'Current Date/Time: 2026-02-14 12:45:32', 'Time Zone: (UTC+08:00) Perth', '=====================================================================', '```', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 1675-1686', '', '---', '', '### 🔧 Testing Routines Details', '', '#### TestingScript-AppTeseting', '', '**Scans:**', '- All `.md` files recursively', '- All `.ps1`, `.psm1`, `.psd1` files recursively', '', '**Checks:**', '1. **Empty files**', '2. **Missing headings** in markdown', '3. **Duplicate headings** (case-insensitive)', '4. **Duplicate paragraphs** (>20 chars)', '5. **Contradictions** (e.g., "supported" vs "not supported")', '6. **Incomplete content** (TODO/TBD markers)', '7. **Duplicate comments** (>2 occurrences)', '8. **Stale paths** in comments', '', '**Output:**', '- Timestamped log: `logs/testing-app-testing-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.txt`', '- Format: Table with Type, File, Issue, Detail', '- Returns report object with Count property', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 989-1072', '', '#### TestingScipt-ScrutinyScriptsSafteyAndSecOps', '', '**Scans:**', '- All `.ps1`, `.psm1`, `.psd1` files recursively', '', '**Detects:**', '1. Safety patterns (10 types)', '2. Secret patterns (5 types)', '3. Assigns safety score per script', '4. Logs full file path', '', '**Output:**', '- Timestamped log: `logs/scrutiny-safety-secops-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.txt`', '- Format: Table with Type, File, Issue, Detail', '- First row per script shows safety score', '- Returns report object with Count property', '', '**Code Location:** Lines 1133-1170', '', '---', '', '### 📝 Configuration Updates', '', '**system-variables.xml Changes:**', '', '```xml', '', ' 2602', ' a', ' 7', '', '', '', ' ~BACKUPS', ' FOLDER-ROOT', ' logs ', '', '```', '', '**New File:** `config/links.xml`', '- Contains category/link structure', '- Easily editable', '- XML format for parsing', '', '---', '', '### 🎨 UI/UX Improvements', '', '**Menu Structure Update:**', '', '```', 'Menu Bar', '├─ File', '│ └─ Exit (Ctrl+Q)', '├─ Tests ⭐ NEW', '│ ├─ Version Check', '│ ├─ Network Diagnostics', '│ ├─ ──────────', '│ ├─ Disk Check', '│ ├─ Privacy Check', '│ ├─ System Check', '│ ├─ ──────────', '│ ├─ App Testing (Docs & Comments) ⭐ NEW', '│ └─ Scrutiny Safety & SecOps ⭐ NEW', '├─ Links ⭐ NEW', '│ ├─ [Dynamic from XML]', '│ └─ (6 default categories)', '├─ WinGets ⭐ NEW', '│ ├─ Installed Apps (Grid View)', '│ ├─ Detect Updates (Check-Only)', '│ └─ Update All (Admin Options)', '├─ Tools', '│ ├─ View Config', '│ ├─ Open Logs Directory', '│ ├─ ──────────', '│ ├─ Scriptz n Portz N PowerShellD (Layout)', '│ ├─ Button Maintenance', '│ ├─ Network Details', '│ └─ AVPN Connection Tracker', '└─ Help', ' ├─ Update-Help', ' ├─ PwShGUI App Help (Webpage Index) ⭐ NEW', ' ├─ Package Workspace', ' ├─ ──────────', ' └─ About', '```', '', '---', '', '### 🐛 Bug Fixes', '', '**Version Tag Issues:**', '- Fixed HTML files being flagged for missing tags', '- Excluded `.html`, `.htm` from version checks', '- Added logs folder to exclusions', '- Fixed diff file self-referencing', '', '**Wait-Job Timeout:**', '- Removed job-based timeout (caused blocking)', '- Replaced with simple `Read-Host` prompt', '- User has full control over timing', '', '**Version helper alignment:**', '- Startup flow uses `Test-VersionTag`', '- Manifest generation uses `New-BuildManifest`', '- Increment behavior is controlled by startup authorization logic', '', '---', '', '### 📈 Log Volume Impact (Updated)', '', '**New Log Entries Per:**', '- App Testing run: ~5-20 KB', '- Safety Scrutiny run: ~10-50 KB', '- Script execution with safety score: +0.2 KB', '- Version check with mismatches: +2-5 KB', '', '**Daily Estimate (10 sessions + 2 tests):**', '- Previous: 50-100 KB', '- New: 100-150 KB', '', '---', '', '### ✅ Testing Checklist (Updated)', '', '- [x] Documentation reorganized to `~README.md/`', '- [x] Help index HTML displays correctly', '- [x] Version check runs before auto-increment', '- [x] User prompt accepts "AA" for increment', '- [x] Tests menu shows 7 items', '- [x] Links menu populates from XML', '- [x] WinGets menu shows 3 items', '- [x] App Testing generates report', '- [x] Safety Scrutiny scores all scripts', '- [x] Reports auto-open after scan', '- [x] Safety score logs with full path', '- [x] Scripts >50 run with `-WhatIf`', '- [x] HTML files excluded from version tags', '- [x] Logs folder excluded from checks', '', '---', '', '### 🔄 Version History (Updated)', '', '### v2602.a.7+ (Current) - February 14, 2026', '- ✅ Documentation reorganization', '- ✅ Help index system with iframe', '- ✅ Conditional version auto-increment', '- ✅ Tests menu with 7 functions', '- ✅ Links menu with XML config', '- ✅ WinGets menu for package management', '- ✅ App Testing routine', '- ✅ Safety Scrutiny with scoring', '- ✅ Safety badge in elevation prompt', '- ✅ Auto `-WhatIf` for moderate scripts', '- ✅ Enhanced system info display', '- ✅ Auto-open reports after scans', '', '### v1.0.1 - January 25, 2026', '- ✅ Fixed GUI display issue', '- ✅ Added Event log level', '- ✅ Added Debug log level', '- ✅ Comprehensive event logging throughout', '- ✅ Enhanced error handling', '- ✅ Better startup/shutdown logging', '', '### v1.0.0 - January 24, 2026', '- Initial release', '', '---', '', '**Status: ✅ Ready for Production Use**', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '## 2026-03-29 -- Version 2603.B0.v27.0: koe-RumA Agent & Version Format Revision', '', '### Version Format Revision', '- **Format:** `YYMM.B.v.` -- corrected from `v26` to `v27.0` (MAJOR.minor)', '- **Scope:** All PS1, PSM1, BAT, JSON, XHTML, MD files updated (~90+ files)', '- **Excluded:** Sovereign-kernel files retain independent `SK.v15.c8.xxx.1` scheme', '- **Config:** `pwsh-app-config-BASE.json` version field updated to `2603.B0.v27.0`', '', '### koe-RumA Agent (new) -- `MILESTONE-koeRumA-init`', '- **Created `agents/koe-RumA/`** -- Rumi-inspired poet-philosopher agent', ' - **Core Module:** `core/koe-RumA.psm1` (14.6KB, 12 functions, 0 parse errors)', ' - **Tools:** Imagination, Dreams, Manifestation, Convergence, PolyMultiplism', ' - `Invoke-Imagination` -- Poetic insight and creative framing for pipeline states', ' - `Invoke-Dreams` -- Aspirational trajectories and what-if scenarios', ' - `Invoke-Manifestation` -- Abstract insights to concrete pipeline actions', ' - `Invoke-Convergence` -- Synthesises open+close into milestone reflection', ' - `Invoke-PolyMultiplism` -- Rational many-many matrix model, self-designed over 12 days', ' - **Pipeline Behavior:**', ' - Normal: Opens OR closes pipeline with Rumi-inspired commentary', ' - Monthly milestone (1st): Opens AND closes -- MILESTONE-koeRumA-{yyyy-MM} tag', ' - `Invoke-KoeRumASession` -- Main entry point, auto-detects milestone days', ' - `Invoke-MilestoneEvent` -- Forces milestone with ENHANCEMENTS-LOG.md logging', ' - **Registered** in `agent_registry.json` as koe-RumA-00 (POET_PHILOSOPHER / SUBAGENT)', '', '### Logging', '- Logging levels set to **Informational** (Info) as default across Write-AppLog and Write-ScriptLog', '- Config `logging.levels` confirmed: Debug, Info, Warning, Error, Success, Section', '', '', '' ].join('\n'); function loadChangelog() { var sel = document.getElementById('logSelect').value; var content = null; if (sel === 'CHANGELOG') { content = CHANGELOG_CONTENT; } else if (sel === 'ENHANCEMENTS-LOG') { content = ENHANCEMENTS_CONTENT; } else if (typeof LOG_INDEX !== 'undefined') { for (var li = 0; li < LOG_INDEX.length; li++) { if (LOG_INDEX[li].id === sel) { content = LOG_INDEX[li].lines.join('\n'); break; } } } if (!content) { document.getElementById('browseContent').innerHTML = '
⚠
Source not loaded.
'; return; } _rawLines = content.split('\n'); _versions = parseChangelog(_rawLines); populateVersionDropdowns(); applyFilters(); trackViewerChange(sel); } function trackViewerChange(source) { try { var k = 'cv_change_count'; var n = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(k) || '0', 10) + 1; localStorage.setItem(k, String(n)); var el = document.getElementById('changeCounter'); if (el) { el.textContent = 'Δ:' + n; } console.log('[ChangelogViewer] change#' + n + ' source=' + source + ' versions=' + _versions.length + ' rawLines=' + _rawLines.length + ' ts=' + new Date().toISOString()); } catch(e) { /*
