2026-04-25 06:54:32"',' ]','}'] } ]; var LOG_INDEX_GENERATED = '2026-04-29 03:09:11'; var LOG_INDEX_COUNT = 36; /* LOG_INDEX_END */ function populateLogIndexDropdown() { if (typeof LOG_INDEX === 'undefined') return; var grp = document.getElementById('logIndexGroup'); if (!grp) return; grp.innerHTML = ''; var cats = ['Pipeline','ScriptExec','AgentIter','Report']; for (var ci = 0; ci < cats.length; ci++) { for (var i = 0; i < LOG_INDEX.length; i++) { var it = LOG_INDEX[i]; if (it.category !== cats[ci]) continue; var o = document.createElement('option'); o.value = it.id; o.textContent = '[' + it.category + '] ' + it.name + ' (' + it.lineCount + 'ln)'; grp.appendChild(o); } } } function parseChangelog(lines) { var versions = []; var cur = null; var curSection = ''; for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { var ln = lines[i]; // Version header: ## [tag] — date OR ## ⚙ date — Session ... var m = ln.match(/^## \[([^\]]+)\]\s*[—–-]\s*(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})/); if (!m) { m = ln.match(/^## [⚙📌🔧✨🆕]\s*(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})\s*[—–-]\s*(.*)/); } if (m) { if (cur) { versions.push(cur); } cur = { tag: m[1], date: m[2] || m[1], sections: {}, raw: ln + '\n', lineStart: i }; curSection = ''; continue; } if (!cur) continue; cur.raw += ln + '\n'; // Section header: ### Added, ### Changed, etc. var sm = ln.match(/^### (Added|Changed|Fixed|Removed|Security|Deprecated|Pipeline Metrics)/); if (sm) { curSection = sm[1]; if (!cur.sections[curSection]) { cur.sections[curSection] = []; } continue; } // List items if (curSection && ln.match(/^- /)) { cur.sections[curSection].push(ln.substring(2)); } // Table rows (pipeline metrics) if (curSection === 'Pipeline Metrics' && ln.match(/^\|/) && !ln.match(/^\|[\s-|]+$/)) { cur.sections[curSection].push(ln); } } if (cur) { versions.push(cur); } return versions; } function populateVersionDropdowns() { var opts = ''; for (var i = 0; i < _versions.length; i++) { var v = _versions[i]; opts += ''; } document.getElementById('diffFrom').innerHTML = opts; document.getElementById('diffTo').innerHTML = opts; document.getElementById('combFrom').innerHTML = opts; document.getElementById('combTo').innerHTML = opts; if (_versions.length > 1) { document.getElementById('diffFrom').selectedIndex = 1; document.getElementById('diffTo').selectedIndex = 0; document.getElementById('combFrom').selectedIndex = _versions.length - 1; document.getElementById('combTo').selectedIndex = 0; } } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // FILTERING // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function applyFilters() { var search = (document.getElementById('searchInput').value || '').toLowerCase(); var dateFrom = document.getElementById('dateFrom').value; var dateTo = document.getElementById('dateTo').value; var category = document.getElementById('categoryFilter').value; var typeVal = document.getElementById('typeFilter').value; var typeMap = { sin: '\u2E38', feature: '\u2699', file: '\uD83D\uDCC4', manifest: '\uD83D\uDCCB', pipeline: '\uD83D\uDD01', tracking: '\uD83D\uDCCC' }; var filtered = []; var totals = { Added: 0, Changed: 0, Fixed: 0, Files: 0, Sins: 0 }; for (var i = 0; i < _versions.length; i++) { var v = _versions[i]; // Date filter if (dateFrom && v.date < dateFrom) continue; if (dateTo && v.date > dateTo) continue; var vFiltered = { tag: v.tag, date: v.date, sections: {}, raw: v.raw }; var hasMatch = false; for (var sec in v.sections) { if (!v.sections.hasOwnProperty(sec)) continue; if (category && sec !== category) continue; var items = v.sections[sec]; var filteredItems = []; for (var j = 0; j < items.length; j++) { var item = items[j]; if (search && item.toLowerCase().indexOf(search) === -1) continue; if (typeVal && item.indexOf(typeMap[typeVal] || '___') === -1) continue; filteredItems.push(item); // Count totals if (sec === 'Added') totals.Added++; if (sec === 'Changed') totals.Changed++; if (sec === 'Fixed') totals.Fixed++; if (item.indexOf('\uD83D\uDCC4') !== -1) totals.Files++; if (item.indexOf('\u2E38') !== -1) totals.Sins++; } if (filteredItems.length > 0) { vFiltered.sections[sec] = filteredItems; hasMatch = true; } } // If no category/type/search filter, show version even if empty sections if (!category && !typeVal && !search) hasMatch = true; if (hasMatch) filtered.push(vFiltered); } // Update stats document.getElementById('statVersions').textContent = filtered.length; document.getElementById('statAdded').textContent = totals.Added; document.getElementById('statChanged').textContent = totals.Changed; document.getElementById('statFixed').textContent = totals.Fixed; document.getElementById('statFiles').textContent = totals.Files; document.getElementById('statSins').textContent = totals.Sins; renderVersions(filtered, search); } function clearFilters() { document.getElementById('searchInput').value = ''; document.getElementById('dateFrom').value = ''; document.getElementById('dateTo').value = ''; document.getElementById('categoryFilter').selectedIndex = 0; document.getElementById('typeFilter').selectedIndex = 0; applyFilters(); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // RENDERING // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function renderVersions(versions, highlight) { var html = ''; if (versions.length === 0) { html = '
🔍
No entries match the current filters
'; } for (var i = 0; i < versions.length; i++) { var v = versions[i]; html += '
'; html += '

' + escHtml(v.tag) + ' ' + v.date + '

'; for (var sec in v.sections) { if (!v.sections.hasOwnProperty(sec)) continue; var tagClass = 'tag-' + sec.toLowerCase().replace(/\s.*/,''); html += '

' + escHtml(sec) + '

'; if (sec === 'Pipeline Metrics') { html += renderTable(v.sections[sec]); } else { html += '
    '; for (var j = 0; j < v.sections[sec].length; j++) { var txt = escHtml(v.sections[sec][j]); if (highlight) { txt = highlightText(txt, highlight); } html += '
  • ' + txt + '
    • '; } html += '
'; } } html += '
'; } document.getElementById('browseContent').innerHTML = html; } function renderTable(rows) { if (rows.length < 2) return ''; var html = ''; for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) { var cells = rows[i].split('|').filter(function(c) { return c.trim() !== ''; }); if (i === 0) { html += ''; for (var c = 0; c < cells.length; c++) html += ''; html += ''; } else if (!rows[i].match(/^[\s|:-]+$/)) { html += ''; for (var c = 0; c < cells.length; c++) html += ''; html += ''; } } html += '
' + escHtml(cells[c].trim()) + '
' + escHtml(cells[c].trim()) + '
'; return html; } function highlightText(text, term) { if (!term) return text; var idx = text.toLowerCase().indexOf(term.toLowerCase()); if (idx === -1) return text; return text.substring(0, idx) + '' + text.substring(idx, idx + term.length) + '' + text.substring(idx + term.length); } function escHtml(s) { var d = document.createElement('div'); d.appendChild(document.createTextNode(s)); return d.innerHTML; } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DIFFERENTIAL COMPARISON // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function computeDiff() { var fi = parseInt(document.getElementById('diffFrom').value, 10); var ti = parseInt(document.getElementById('diffTo').value, 10); if (isNaN(fi) || isNaN(ti) || fi === ti) { alert('Select two different versions'); return; } var vFrom = _versions[fi]; var vTo = _versions[ti]; document.getElementById('diffLeftHeader').textContent = vFrom.tag + ' (' + vFrom.date + ')'; document.getElementById('diffRightHeader').textContent = vTo.tag + ' (' + vTo.date + ')'; // Build sets for comparison var leftItems = collectAllItems(vFrom); var rightItems = collectAllItems(vTo); var leftHtml = '', rightHtml = ''; // Items only in left (removed relative to right) for (var i = 0; i < leftItems.length; i++) { if (rightItems.indexOf(leftItems[i]) === -1) { leftHtml += '- ' + escHtml(leftItems[i]) + ''; } else { leftHtml += ' ' + escHtml(leftItems[i]) + ''; } } // Items only in right (added relative to left) for (var i = 0; i < rightItems.length; i++) { if (leftItems.indexOf(rightItems[i]) === -1) { rightHtml += '+ ' + escHtml(rightItems[i]) + ''; } else { rightHtml += ' ' + escHtml(rightItems[i]) + ''; } } document.getElementById('diffLeft').innerHTML = leftHtml || '(no entries)'; document.getElementById('diffRight').innerHTML = rightHtml || '(no entries)'; } function collectAllItems(version) { var items = []; for (var sec in version.sections) { if (!version.sections.hasOwnProperty(sec)) continue; for (var i = 0; i < version.sections[sec].length; i++) { items.push('[' + sec + '] ' + version.sections[sec][i]); } } return items; } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // COMBINED VIEW // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function buildCombined() { var fi = parseInt(document.getElementById('combFrom').value, 10); var ti = parseInt(document.getElementById('combTo').value, 10); if (isNaN(fi) || isNaN(ti)) { alert('Select version range'); return; } var lo = Math.min(fi, ti); var hi = Math.max(fi, ti); var merged = { Added: [], Changed: [], Fixed: [], Removed: [], Security: [], Deprecated: [], 'Pipeline Metrics': [] }; for (var i = lo; i <= hi; i++) { var v = _versions[i]; for (var sec in v.sections) { if (!v.sections.hasOwnProperty(sec)) continue; if (!merged[sec]) merged[sec] = []; for (var j = 0; j < v.sections[sec].length; j++) { merged[sec].push(v.sections[sec][j] + ' [' + v.tag + ']'); } } } var fromTag = _versions[hi].tag; var toTag = _versions[lo].tag; var fname = 'combined-' + fromTag.replace(/\./g,'-') + '_to_' + toTag.replace(/\./g,'-') + '.mdv'; document.getElementById('combBanner').style.display = 'flex'; document.getElementById('combFilename').textContent = fname; var html = '
'; html += '

Combined: ' + escHtml(fromTag) + ' → ' + escHtml(toTag) + '

'; for (var sec in merged) { if (!merged.hasOwnProperty(sec) || merged[sec].length === 0) continue; var tagClass = 'tag-' + sec.toLowerCase().replace(/\s.*/,''); html += '

' + escHtml(sec) + ' (' + merged[sec].length + ')

'; html += '
    '; for (var k = 0; k < merged[sec].length; k++) { html += '
  • ' + escHtml(merged[sec][k]) + '
    • '; } html += '
'; } html += '
'; document.getElementById('combContent').innerHTML = html; } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // .MDV EXPORT / MANAGEMENT // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function exportMdv() { var fi = parseInt(document.getElementById('diffFrom').value, 10); var ti = parseInt(document.getElementById('diffTo').value, 10); if (isNaN(fi) || isNaN(ti) || fi === ti) { alert('Run a comparison first'); return; } var vFrom = _versions[fi]; var vTo = _versions[ti]; var fname = 'diff-' + vFrom.tag.replace(/\./g,'-') + '_vs_' + vTo.tag.replace(/\./g,'-') + '.mdv'; var md = '\n'; md += '\n'; md += '\n\n'; md += '# Differential: ' + vFrom.tag + ' vs ' + vTo.tag + '\n\n'; md += '## Removed in ' + vTo.tag + ' (present in ' + vFrom.tag + ')\n\n'; var leftItems = collectAllItems(vFrom); var rightItems = collectAllItems(vTo); for (var i = 0; i < leftItems.length; i++) { if (rightItems.indexOf(leftItems[i]) === -1) { md += '- ~~' + leftItems[i] + '~~\n'; } } md += '\n## Added in ' + vTo.tag + ' (not in ' + vFrom.tag + ')\n\n'; for (var i = 0; i < rightItems.length; i++) { if (leftItems.indexOf(rightItems[i]) === -1) { md += '- **' + rightItems[i] + '**\n'; } } saveMdv(fname, md); alert('Exported: ' + fname); } function exportCombinedMdv() { var fi = parseInt(document.getElementById('combFrom').value, 10); var ti = parseInt(document.getElementById('combTo').value, 10); if (isNaN(fi) || isNaN(ti)) { alert('Build a combined view first'); return; } var lo = Math.min(fi, ti); var hi = Math.max(fi, ti); var fromTag = _versions[hi].tag; var toTag = _versions[lo].tag; var fname = 'combined-' + fromTag.replace(/\./g,'-') + '_to_' + toTag.replace(/\./g,'-') + '.mdv'; var md = '\n'; md += '\n'; md += '\n'; md += '\n\n'; md += '# Combined Changelog: ' + fromTag + ' → ' + toTag + '\n\n'; for (var i = lo; i <= hi; i++) { md += _versions[i].raw + '\n'; } saveMdv(fname, md); alert('Exported: ' + fname); } function saveMdv(filename, content) { // Check for existing for (var i = 0; i < _mdvStore.length; i++) { if (_mdvStore[i].filename === filename) { _mdvStore[i].content = content; _mdvStore[i].created = new Date().toISOString(); persistMdvStore(); return; } } _mdvStore.push({ filename: filename, content: content, created: new Date().toISOString() }); persistMdvStore(); } function persistMdvStore() { try { localStorage.setItem('pwshgui_mdv_store', JSON.stringify(_mdvStore)); } catch(e) { /* quota */ } } function loadMdvStore() { try { var s = localStorage.getItem('pwshgui_mdv_store'); if (s) { _mdvStore = JSON.parse(s); } } catch(e) { _mdvStore = []; } } function refreshMdvList() { loadMdvStore(); var sel = document.getElementById('mdvSelect'); sel.innerHTML = ''; for (var i = 0; i < _mdvStore.length; i++) { sel.innerHTML += ''; } } function loadMdv() { var idx = parseInt(document.getElementById('mdvSelect').value, 10); if (isNaN(idx) || !_mdvStore[idx]) { document.getElementById('mdvContent').innerHTML = '
📄
Select an .mdv file
'; return; } var mdv = _mdvStore[idx]; var lines = mdv.content.split('\n'); var html = '
' + escHtml(mdv.filename) + ' Generated: ' + mdv.created + '
'; html += '
'; for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) { var ln = escHtml(lines[i]); if (lines[i].indexOf('~~') !== -1) { html += '' + ln + ''; } else if (lines[i].indexOf('**') !== -1 && lines[i].indexOf('- **') !== -1) { html += '' + ln + ''; } else if (lines[i].indexOf('#') === 0) { html += '' + ln + '\n'; } else { html += ln + '\n'; } } html += '
'; document.getElementById('mdvContent').innerHTML = html; } function clearMdvFiles() { if (!confirm('Clear all generated .mdv files from local storage?')) return; _mdvStore = []; persistMdvStore(); refreshMdvList(); document.getElementById('mdvContent').innerHTML = '
🗑
All .mdv files cleared
'; } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // DIFF LAB — V33.5 (browser-side arbitrary-file diff + scheduler integration) // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ var _arbL = null, _arbR = null; function loadArbFile(side) { var inp = document.getElementById(side === 'L' ? 'arbLeftFile' : 'arbRightFile'); if (!inp.files || !inp.files[0]) return; var f = inp.files[0]; var rdr = new FileReader(); rdr.onload = function(e) { var payload = { name: f.name, size: f.size, content: e.target.result, lines: e.target.result.split(/\r?\n/) }; if (side === 'L') { _arbL = payload; document.getElementById('arbLeftHeader').textContent = f.name + ' (' + f.size + ' B, ' + payload.lines.length + ' lines)'; } else { _arbR = payload; document.getElementById('arbRightHeader').textContent = f.name + ' (' + f.size + ' B, ' + payload.lines.length + ' lines)'; } }; rdr.readAsText(f); } function swapArbFiles() { var t = _arbL; _arbL = _arbR; _arbR = t; document.getElementById('arbLeftHeader').textContent = _arbL ? _arbL.name : 'Pick a left file'; document.getElementById('arbRightHeader').textContent = _arbR ? _arbR.name : 'Pick a right file'; if (_arbL && _arbR) runArbDiff(); } function runArbDiff() { if (!_arbL || !_arbR) { alert('Pick both files first'); return; } var L = _arbL.lines, R = _arbR.lines; var rSet = {}; for (var i = 0; i < R.length; i++) { rSet[R[i]] = (rSet[R[i]] || 0) + 1; } var lSet = {}; for (var j = 0; j < L.length; j++) { lSet[L[j]] = (lSet[L[j]] || 0) + 1; } var leftHtml = '', rightHtml = '', adds = 0, dels = 0, same = 0; for (var a = 0; a < L.length; a++) { if ((rSet[L[a]] || 0) > 0) { leftHtml += ' ' + escHtml(L[a]) + ''; same++; } else { leftHtml += '- ' + escHtml(L[a]) + ''; dels++; } } for (var b = 0; b < R.length; b++) { if ((lSet[R[b]] || 0) > 0) { rightHtml += ' ' + escHtml(R[b]) + ''; } else { rightHtml += '+ ' + escHtml(R[b]) + ''; adds++; } } document.getElementById('arbLeft').innerHTML = leftHtml || '(empty)'; document.getElementById('arbRight').innerHTML = rightHtml || '(empty)'; document.getElementById('arbLeftHeader').textContent = _arbL.name + ' — -' + dels + ' / =' + same; document.getElementById('arbRightHeader').textContent = _arbR.name + ' — +' + adds + ' / =' + same; } function exportArbMdv() { if (!_arbL || !_arbR) { alert('Run a comparison first'); return; } var fname = 'arb-' + _arbL.name.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]/g,'_') + '_vs_' + _arbR.name.replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]/g,'_') + '.mdv'; var md = '\n'; md += '\n'; md += '\n'; md += '\n\n'; md += '# Arbitrary File Diff\n\n## Removed (left only)\n\n'; var rSet = {}; for (var i = 0; i < _arbR.lines.length; i++) { rSet[_arbR.lines[i]] = 1; } for (var a = 0; a < _arbL.lines.length; a++) { if (!rSet[_arbL.lines[a]]) md += '- ~~' + _arbL.lines[a] + '~~\n'; } md += '\n## Added (right only)\n\n'; var lSet = {}; for (var j = 0; j < _arbL.lines.length; j++) { lSet[_arbL.lines[j]] = 1; } for (var b = 0; b < _arbR.lines.length; b++) { if (!lSet[_arbR.lines[b]]) md += '- **' + _arbR.lines[b] + '**\n'; } saveMdv(fname, md); alert('Exported: ' + fname); } function addSchedulerPair() { if (!_arbL || !_arbR) { alert('Pick both files first so the scheduler knows what to compare'); return; } var label = prompt('Pair label (alphanumeric):', _arbL.name.replace(/\W+/g,'') + '_vs_' + _arbR.name.replace(/\W+/g,'')); if (!label) return; var leftPath = prompt('Workspace-relative left path:', _arbL.name); if (!leftPath) return; var rightPath = prompt('Workspace-relative right path:', _arbR.name); if (!rightPath) return; var snippet = JSON.stringify({ label: label, left: leftPath, right: rightPath, mode: 'line' }, null, 2); if (typeof ENGINE_BASE !== 'undefined' && ENGINE_BASE && typeof fetch === 'function') { fetch(ENGINE_BASE + '/api/diffscheduler/add', { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: snippet }) .then(function(r){ if (r.ok) { alert('Pair added to config/diff-scheduler.json'); loadSchedulerDiffs(); } else { throw new Error('http ' + r.status); } }) .catch(function(){ copyToClip(snippet); alert('Engine unavailable. JSON snippet copied to clipboard — paste into config/diff-scheduler.json "pairs" array.'); }); } else { copyToClip(snippet); alert('JSON snippet copied to clipboard. Paste into config/diff-scheduler.json "pairs" array.'); } } function copyToClip(s) { try { navigator.clipboard.writeText(s); } catch(e) { var t = document.createElement('textarea'); t.value = s; document.body.appendChild(t); t.select(); document.execCommand('copy'); document.body.removeChild(t); } } function loadSchedulerDiffs() { var dst = document.getElementById('schedDiffList'); dst.innerHTML = '
⏳
Loading...
'; var url = (typeof ENGINE_BASE !== 'undefined' && ENGINE_BASE) ? (ENGINE_BASE + '/api/files?path=~REPORTS/diffs') : '~REPORTS/diffs/'; if (typeof fetch !== 'function') { dst.innerHTML = '
No fetch API
'; return; } fetch(url).then(function(r){ if (!r.ok) throw new Error(r.status); return r.json(); }) .then(function(list) { var files = (list && list.items) ? list.items : (Array.isArray(list) ? list : []); files = files.filter(function(f){ return /\.json$/i.test(f.name || f); }); if (!files.length) { dst.innerHTML = '
📦
No scheduler results yet. Wait for next hourly cycle, or run pwsh scripts/Invoke-DiffScheduler.ps1 -Once
'; return; } var html = ''; for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) { var n = files[i].name || files[i]; html += ''; } html += '
FileAction
' + escHtml(n) + '
'; dst.innerHTML = html; }) .catch(function(e){ dst.innerHTML = '
⚠
Could not list ~REPORTS/diffs ('+ e + '). Engine may be offline; open ~REPORTS/diffs/ manually.
'; }); } function viewSchedulerDiff(name) { var url = (typeof ENGINE_BASE !== 'undefined' && ENGINE_BASE) ? (ENGINE_BASE + '/api/file?path=~REPORTS/diffs/' + encodeURIComponent(name)) : '~REPORTS/diffs/' + encodeURIComponent(name); fetch(url).then(function(r){ return r.json(); }).then(function(env){ var s = env.stats || {}; document.getElementById('arbLeftHeader').textContent = env.left + ' — -' + (s.deleted || 0); document.getElementById('arbRightHeader').textContent = env.right + ' — +' + (s.added || 0) + ' / ~' + (s.modified || 0); var leftHtml = '', rightHtml = ''; var rows = env.rows || []; for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) { var t = rows[i].type, txt = escHtml(rows[i].text || ''); if (t === 'Deleted') { leftHtml += '- ' + txt + ''; } else if (t === 'Inserted'){ rightHtml += '+ ' + txt + ''; } else { leftHtml += ' ' + txt + ''; rightHtml += ' ' + txt + ''; } } document.getElementById('arbLeft').innerHTML = leftHtml || '(no left rows)'; document.getElementById('arbRight').innerHTML = rightHtml || '(no right rows)'; }).catch(function(e){ alert('Failed: ' + e); }); } // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // INIT // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ (function init() { loadMdvStore(); populateLogIndexDropdown(); try { var n = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('cv_change_count') || '0', 10); var el = document.getElementById('changeCounter'); if (el) { el.textContent = 'Δ:' + n; } } catch(e){} loadChangelog(); })(); //]]>
